faqs.question: Is CMR University a private or public university?
faqs.answer: CMR University is a private university. The university is accredited by NAAC A+ Grade and ISO certified. CMR University is approed by the UGC, COA and AICTE. The institute is a member of AIU, Associated Chambers of Commerce and Industry of India, IETE, Association of Management Development Institutions in South Asia, CSI, Institution of Engineers, IEI, ORSI, and ISTE.

faqs.question: What is unique about School of Engineering and Technology, CMR University?
faqs.answer: The School Of Engineering and Technology offers academic programmers in prominent Engineering and Technology fields. The school's strong knowledge partnerships and collaborations with industry enable the delivery of a curriculum that is relevant and current with industry and academic trends. School of Engineering and Technology has collaborations with other academic institutes, foreign universities and with the industry. The School of Engineering has collaborated with the institute of NASSCOM.

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at CMR University Chagalatti Bangalore are BTech and MBA. The university offers BTech programme at the UG level. The university offers BTech specialisations in Computer Science & Engineering, Information Technology, Data Science, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, and others. CMR University Bangalore offers a full-time, two-year MBA programme at the PG level. The MBA programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Fintech, Marketing, HR, Digital Marketing, Product Leadership, Technology Management, and others. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at CMR University Bangalore in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
CMR University placement details are released for its several Schools. According to the data released for School of Engineering and Technology, BTech highest and average package recorded during the recent placement drive was 18 LPA and 4 LPA.

As per School of Management placement date, the overall placement percentage recorded during CMR University placements in MBA and BBA courses was 97.1% and 83.7%. In School of Design, BDes highest package received in recent past was 12 LPA.

More than 20O recruiters visited the campus including Deloitte, Bosch, IBM and Amazon during CMR University’s placements.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: CMR University programs are provided to students at UG, PG, and PhD programs, primarily under streams like Engineering, Commerce, Business & Management, etc. CMR University programs are AICTE-approved and are provided to students on a full-time basis. The college provides BTech, BSc, BCom, BDes, BCA, BArch, etc. programs across various specialisations at the UG level. Besides this, the college provides a number of programmes at the PG level such as MBA, MTech, MSc, etc. The below table illustrates a list of CMR University courses with eligibility criteria and CMR University fee:

faqs.answer: A:    Hostel fees is 80,000/- per annum for the Academic Year 2022-23. CMR Group offers Hostel facilities for students studying in CMRU and CMRIT. The hostel is located within the campus and situated in the most happening place in Bangalore. Full time resident wardens are available to take care of hostelers and to maintain the discipline. A stand by power generator is available with full time attendant in the hostel to operate during power failures. Fully furnished and spacious rooms are there.
faqs.question: What is hostel fee at School of Engineering and Technology, CMR University?

faqs.answer: A:    The Management Quota fee for BCA course ranges between INR 3.30 Lacs and INR 4.80 lakh. The fee is the total of annual fee paid by the candidates every year. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. CMR University conducts an entrance exam to shortlist candidates for BCA admission. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode.

reviews_list.batch_info: BCA in AIML - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: We are around 25 percent of students in the BCA Game Development. Our fee structure is high as we are the first batch. We are trying for placements right now for this course. Around 5 percent of students get internships as developers or technical artists.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and labs are allocated, but some of the equipment is missing. We don’t get proper equipment for game development as we don’t have a dedicated space in our department. We don’t have books related to our course in the library. The hostel fee structure is also high, and the food is okay.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good for talented students.

review_content.Placements: About 60 percent of students got placements in companies like NASA, Infosys, IBM, Wipro, and many others. The highest package is more than 30 LPA, the average is about 15 LPA, and the lowest is 5 LPA. This is about our college placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have good faculty members with high-speed Wi-Fi connection and a good library with all knowledgeable books and computers. We have extracurricular activities like sports and all, and good food in the hostel, and we have medical facilities too.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: MBA is a highly demanded course for this university.

review_content.Placements: The campus placement drive reported a 95% success rate, and the average salary package was 20 LPA. Most graduates found jobs in IT, analytics, consulting, and other sectors. Leading companies like Google, Microsoft, and Cisco are among those hiring the most graduates. There are also opportunities for entrepreneurs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The students have access to new classrooms, upgraded lecture halls, and offices, yet they are not particularly satisfied with the design of the hostel. Various stadiums have been built, along with additional sports facilities. Additionally, there is a cutting-edge gym, along with specialised reading areas and a new library.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely I am satisfied. This campus is most beautiful as I have seen.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is around 60-70%. The highest package is 30 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Tata, and Amazon. From this university, around 70-75% of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided in our college are quite good. They provide free Wi-Fi, free bus transportation to the nearest bus stand, and to the hostel during lunch hours. In the hostel, we get free Wi-Fi, and we enjoy together. We get non-veg weekly twice Sunday and Wednesday.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Placement record and infrastructure are very good, and the faculty members are also humble.

review_content.Placements: Our college placement record is above 90% every year. Here, the highest salary package is 25 LPA, and the starting salary package is 6-8 LPA. Apart from that, you get the best opportunities for various research. For higher studies, students get the opportunity to study within the country or abroad. Various reputed companies like TCS, Amazon, and Infosys visit the campus and offer jobs to many students through interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is well-organized and eye-catching. The classrooms and labs here are bright and air-conditioned. In addition, there is a café area, gym center, and free Wi-Fi. There are sports fields and a large library that has many different types of books.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBA in Business Analytics and Business Intelligence - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: College is good, and the faculty is excellent.

review_content.Placements: They promise placements for all students, but most do not get placed. The salaries offered are also lower than what was mentioned during admission. At first, they mention many companies, but in the end, they blame the students for not performing well.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good, and the classrooms are excellent. The hostel is good, and the canteen is spacious. The canteen has a large area where students spend most of their time relaxing and refreshing themselves.

overview_faqs.question: How much is the fee for MCA course at CMR University?
overview_faqs.answer: The Management Quota fee for MCA course is INR 3.60 lakh. The fee is the total of annual fee paid by the candidates every year. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. CMR University accepts Karnataka PGCET or KMAT for providing admission to MCA course. The selected candidates are further called for document verification round. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode.

overview_faqs.question: What is the procedure to pay fees for MBA at CMR University?
overview_faqs.answer: CMR University MBA fee is INR 250000. Students can pay the fees yearly. Moreover, two years is divided into four terms. Students can pay the fees after completion of two semesters.

admission_overview.college_name: CMR University Admissions 2026: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: CMR University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: CMR University admission 2026 is both merit and entrance-based. CMR University also accepts national or state-level entrance exams like JEE Main, COMEDK UGET and CUET. The university offers more than 50 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels through eight schools and one centre. CMR University Bangalore offers courses in multiple streams like Engineering, Management, Architecture, Science, Law, etc. across three campuses. Candidates can check the following sections to know about the eligibility, admission process and other information about CMR University.

eligibility_selection.title: CMR University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: CMR University Bangalore courses' admissions are based on merit or entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. Candidates who appear for CUET exam are given direct admission. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular CMR University Bangalore courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Bachelor's degree in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate in case of SC/ ST/ OBC/ PH)
courses_table.selection_criteria: CAT/ KMAT/ Karnataka PGCET/ MAT/ ATMA

courses_table.eligibility: Any degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) Must have studied one amongst Mathematics, Business Mathematics, Statistics or Computer Science at Class 12 level
Graduation in BTech with at least 50% aggregate score
Class 12 or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate score
PUC/ Class 12
PUC/ Class 12 or equivalent exam with at least 50% aggregate

Class 12/ second PUC or equivalent exam with English as one of the languages with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category) in Physics & Mathematics along with Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Electronics/ Computers
courses_table.selection_criteria: KCET+ KCET Counselling/ COMEDK UGET + COMEDK UGET Counselling/JEE Main

faqs.answer: Candidates are selected based on merit or entrance exam score at CMR University. The courses are offered in multiple specialisations such as Accounting, Commercial Law, Computer Science, etc. For MBA courses, the university accepts CMAT/MAT, etc., entrance exam scores.
faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for the courses at CMR University?

faqs.answer: CMR University School of Legal Studies admisison is based on merit and entrance exams. The schools accepts national entrance exams like CLAT and CMRUAT. It is necessary for aspiring studnets to qualify one of the exam and meet the eligibility criteria set by the school for the programme.
faqs.question: How can I get admission at CMR University School of Legal Studies?

faqs.answer: Yes, CMR University offers direc admission for candidates who have appeared for CUET exam. The college considers CUET exam score for various UG and PG programmes such as BA, BSc, BCOm, MSc, MA among others.
faqs.question: Is CUET exam score is considered for taking admission in CMR University?

paragraphs: CMR University admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates who fulfil the basic eligibility criteria can fill the online application form and seek admission at CMR University. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at CMR University is as per the steps below:
CMR University Application Process 2026
Candidates can apply online at the official website. Fill the college application form. Also fill the application form of respective entrance exam for Ug and PG programmes.
Selection Process
Students are selected based on multiple exam scores such as GATE, CMAT, CAT, CLAT etc.
Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for further process and pay theCMR University feeto confirm their seats at the university.

description: CMR University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various exams acepted by the university for UG and PG courses. Candidates can use the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details. Other exam-related updates are below:

CMR University accepts several national and state-level entrance exams for admitting students to its MBA/PGDM courses. The MBA course is offered via its affiliated colleges, wherein, for the School of Management, CMR University, the overall CAT cutoff percentile was 40 in 2024. This is for the General AI category students. For more cutoff details, refer to the table below:

Apart from CAT, CMR University also accepts Karnataka PGCET for MBA/PGDM admission. In 2025, the CMR University (OMBR Campus) Karnataka PGCET cutoff rank was 15586 for MBA admission. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same stood at 4062, while in 2023, it was 5416 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Comparing the last round three years' cutoff data, it is evident that CMR University (OMBR Campus) witnessed a fluctuing trend for MBA admission. More details are below:

For MBA admission, candidates can refer to the table below to keep a track of important admission, exam and result dates for multiple exams accepted by the CMR University. Some of the important dates are below:
Candidates can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated round and year-wise cutoff pdf lists to understand the past years cutoff trends for MBA admission at CMR University.

In this section, students can view the last round cutoff trends for the last three years for BTech admission. For the General AI quota, the lowest KCET cutoff rank required was 36709 for admission to the BTech in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning). The highest cutoff rank in the last round was 55398, for the same specialisation.

CMR University COMEDK cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list for BTech admission. In the last round, the cutoff ranks were between 69337 and 109536 among the General AI category students. The last round cutoff ranks for the same category under the Home State quota ranged between 91275 and 102267. To learn more about the round, category and quota-wise cutoff details, use the provided filtres:

CMR University accepts the COMEDK BArch exam for admitting students to its Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) course. In 2024, the last round closing rank was 556 for BArch admission among the students belonging to the General AI quota. In 2023 and 2022, the last round cutoff ranks were 674 and 846, respectively. Analysing the last round cutoff ranks for over three years, it was evident that the cutoff ranks are getting more competitive for admission. Check out the cutoff data below:

hostel_campus.college_name: CMR University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: CMR University's hostel accommodation is currently available off-campus in the vibrant and cosmopolitan area of Banaswadi. On-campus accommodation at the CMRU main campus will be available from 2017 onwards. The hostels feature high-speed wired internet access and dining facility. The hostels are located in heart of Banaswadi. The adjoining CMR Road offers students access to a wide range of dining and entertainment options. Single and double room accommodations are available on first come first served basis.
facilities: Separate hostels for boys and girls

sports.description: Available Facilities: Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Athletics Ground

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by CMR University (OMBR Campus)
reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and labs are allocated, but some of the equipment is missing. We don’t get proper equipment for game development as we don’t have a dedicated space in our department. We don’t have books related to our course in the library. The hostel fee structure is also high, and the food is okay.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by CMR University, Lake Side campusReviewed on 10 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for talented students.
reviews.review_text: We have good faculty members with high-speed Wi-Fi connection and a good library with all knowledgeable books and computers. We have extracurricular activities like sports and all, and good food in the hostel, and we have medical facilities too.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by CMR University, Lake Side campusReviewed on 26 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: MBA is a highly demanded course for this university.
reviews.review_text: The students have access to new classrooms, upgraded lecture halls, and offices, yet they are not particularly satisfied with the design of the hostel. Various stadiums have been built, along with additional sports facilities. Additionally, there is a cutting-edge gym, along with specialised reading areas and a new library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by CMR University, Lake Side campusReviewed on 18 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely I am satisfied. This campus is most beautiful as I have seen.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided in our college are quite good. They provide free Wi-Fi, free bus transportation to the nearest bus stand, and to the hostel during lunch hours. In the hostel, we get free Wi-Fi, and we enjoy together. We get non-veg weekly twice Sunday and Wednesday.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by CMR University (OMBR Campus)
reviews.review_heading: Placement record and infrastructure are very good, and the faculty members are also humble.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is well-organized and eye-catching. The classrooms and labs here are bright and air-conditioned. In addition, there is a café area, gym center, and free Wi-Fi. There are sports fields and a large library that has many different types of books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by CMR University, City CampusReviewed on 21 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good, and the faculty is excellent.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good, and the classrooms are excellent. The hostel is good, and the canteen is spacious. The canteen has a large area where students spend most of their time relaxing and refreshing themselves.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by CMR University (OMBR Campus)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best university for the MBA course.
reviews.review_text: You can gain access to the library, where you can find books. There are no restaurants. Sports and games happen once a month, along with other branches. It's like a tournament, but games don’t happen very often. The lab facilities are good, and you can gain the skills needed in labs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by CMR University (OMBR Campus)
reviews.review_heading: My choice of CMR University has been the best decision of my life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent, and each classroom is equipped with smart boards. Regarding the library, there is a wide selection of books authored by highly experienced writers. Wi-Fi, laboratories, and a canteen are accessible. The food served in the hostel is of good quality. The canteen is well-kept, and nearly all students enjoy visiting it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by CMR University, Lake Side campusReviewed on 10 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and decent placements, but faculty quality and curriculum need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and canteen are available. We get a huge amount of quality in everything. Each department boasts dedicated state-of-the-art laboratories, such as Civil Engineering, Chemistry, Computer Science, Electrical, Electronics, and Mechanical labs, providing students with hands-on experience in their respective fields.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by CMR University, Lake Side campusReviewed on 10 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and the service provided by the faculty in academics.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is well-maintained, and the games are conducted on a weekly basis. Wi-Fi is a little bit problematic, and the education is good, as well as the innovation activities are provided very effectively. The canteen is also well-maintained, and almost all students love to go to the canteen.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by CMR University, Lake Side campusReviewed on 4 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is a good choice if your budget is within 15 lakhs for a management seat.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and smart boards are available in each classroom. When it comes to the library, many books are available, written by well-experienced authors. Separate grounds are available for each game, like Cricket, Basketball, Football, and many others. Also, the food in the canteen is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by CMR University (OMBR Campus)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college's good placement depends on your profile and how you maintain CV.
reviews.review_text: It is well structured but the hostel is not bad good. The truth structure gives you step-by-step details where they teach you based on the professional of law. But when commenting on the hostel, there is no proper food and it does not have proper management. Hostel is 2 KM away from the college where it is difficult to travel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by CMR University, City CampusReviewed on 17 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best and it has value for money.
reviews.review_text: In my college, Wi-Fi is available. A computer lab for computer science students is available, and it is very good. The classroom infrastructure is also good. We have a smart board. The hostel has every facility, but we don't have a lift facility, so we have to climb 4 floors in steps. Food is good. We have an electric kettle, microwave oven, and iron. Sports and games are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by CMR University (OMBR Campus)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and CMR can do better in providing education.
reviews.review_text: The university offers excellent infrastructure with clean classrooms, good sanitation, and a large, well-stocked library. The campus has high-speed Wi-Fi and hygienic food in the hostel and cafeteria. Overall, the management is supportive, ensuring that students get the best facilities and environment for learning and development.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by CMR University (OMBR Campus)
reviews.review_heading: MCA in CMR University, Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: There is a huge library with lots of books. Labs are well-equipped with I5 systems and a good internet connection. Campus has basketball court and small canteen which doesn't have much variety of food items so didn't prefer using it rather using the hotels outside.

college_info.college_name: CMR University

data.description: MCA is a two-year course divided into four semesters. CMR University offers MCA through School of Science Studies and School of Engineering & Technology. Candidates who have passed a UG degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for the MCA course. Aspirants must have studied one out of  Mathematics, Business Mathematics, Statistics & Computer Science at Class 12 level. Admission to MCA course will be based on Karnataka PGCET or KMAT score. The selected candidates are further called for document verification round. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats.

college_info.college_name: CMR University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: CMR University offers scholarships to students as financial aid. The university offers five types of scholarships to students. BTech, MBA, and students belonging to other courses can avail the benefits of the scholarships offered by the university at the UG and PG levels. Given below are the different types of scholarships provided by CMR University:
CMR University offers five types of scholarships to students that are mentioned below:
CMR Memorial Scholarships: CMR University offers Memorial scholarship to the eligible students only
CMR University Merit Scholarships: This scholarship includes Academic Qualifying Examination (Other Than B.Arch)
CMR University Sports Scholarships: This scholarship includes Sports and Cricket Scholarships

faqs.answer: A:    The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: Srinivas Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college is good but has high fees.

content.Placements: This college provides decent placement. Around 50% of students get placed. The highest package is 8 LPA, the lowest is 2 LPA, and the average is around 3.6 LPA. Infosys, TCS, Robosoft, and Juego are the companies that visit for placement. 20% of students got internships in companies like Novigo and EGDK.
content.Infrastructure: Here, all facilities are decent. The labs are decent, and Wi-Fi is available. The classrooms are good. The hostel is present, but the mess food is not good. Sports facilities are decent. The library and labs still need improvement. The hostels are good, but Wi-Fi is slow.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college, but it's left to you what to choose.

content.Placements: I am from the 2026 batch, studying a Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science. 80% of students are placed in our college. The highest package given is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. The companies that visit are TCS, Wipro, HCL, and Elsevier. About 75% of students got internships. The roles offered are software developer, system engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is there in labs and also in the hostel mess. Classrooms are also good. Hostel rooms are good, but sometimes the water is dirty. Food is just okay, only veg, no non-veg is provided. There is no lift in the hostel, so if you are staying on the 5th floor, it will be difficult to walk daily. Warden also keeps changing, new wardens come, but all are good. Cleaning is done every two days.

hostel_campus.college_name: Srinivas Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: This college is good but has high fees.
reviews.review_text: Here, all facilities are decent. The labs are decent, and Wi-Fi is available. The classrooms are good. The hostel is present, but the mess food is not good. Sports facilities are decent. The library and labs still need improvement. The hostels are good, but Wi-Fi is slow.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but it's left to you what to choose.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is there in labs and also in the hostel mess. Classrooms are also good. Hostel rooms are good, but sometimes the water is dirty. Food is just okay, only veg, no non-veg is provided. There is no lift in the hostel, so if you are staying on the 5th floor, it will be difficult to walk daily. Warden also keeps changing, new wardens come, but all are good. Cleaning is done every two days.

reviews.review_heading: It is an extremely beautiful and good college.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides a hostel facility for both boys and girls. There are bedrooms with attached bathrooms. The hotel food is good, with homemade food. The canteen is also available. The college infrastructure is good. Classrooms and labs are also good. The library is available in the college. It is Wi-Fi enabled.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very nice college and you will get very good faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In our college, they conduct labs based on the machines used in ships and other machinery systems. We have a very good library, and our college campus provides free Wi-Fi. The college canteen food is much better compared to outside food.

reviews.review_heading: I have mentioned the college infrastructure and other details above. Please summarize that.
reviews.review_text: The subject lab facilities are also good, classrooms are neat and clean, and no negative comments on that. The library will help us during exam time, which is very helpful to the students, and it is very good. Our SIT College provides good hostel facilities, which is more important for students to stay. Coming to the hostel, it is neat and clean. The food quality is not too bad in the hostel. We can get the medical facilities nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus for students who are looking for a bright future. Placements are good.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are often good with a single chair per student. College Wi-Fi is within a limit of 100 Mbps. Computer labs are well-maintained with AC and also have a good Wi-Fi connection. Library is filled with all books related to daily life and course.

reviews.review_heading: Faculties are good at our college. Placement opportunities are average compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: Library resources: The SRT library is well-equipped with a vast collection of books, general e-resources, and digital databases, providing a conducive environment for research and study crossroads at SITR designed to enhance the learning experience. Suturing modern amenities such as projectors at smart boards.

reviews.review_heading: Shrinivas Institute of Technology in B.E. Computer Science and Engineering admission in 2025-26.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure quality in this college is very good and uses high-quality materials. The college provides many facilities like fast Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, a library, drinking water, a hostel, etc. Facilities are available. The canteen food is very neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the experience of our SIT college .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well constructed. There most of the buildings are looking beautiful and attractive. All lab classes have good equipment. They're having free Wi-Fi for the requirement of students. The hostel is decent, and the food is acceptable. Medical and sports facilities were well provided at our time. I love it here.

reviews.review_heading: Innovation Hub: Unravelling the wonders of Srinivas Institute of Technology .
reviews.review_text: There is free Wi-Fi in the library. The labs are well-equipped. Classroom is also good, it has a projector, blackboard, and seats are arranged in a form of steps. Hostel is also good. The hostel has a spectacular view at the back. The hostel has a strict warden and security.

reviews.review_heading: College is decent, placement-wise it lacks. Labs and other facilities are good on point.
reviews.review_text: Labs have decent Wi-Fi, classrooms are good. The mess is not good, sports facilities are decent. The library still needs improvement. Labs also can be improved. The hostel is not good, the mess is fine. The Wi-Fi is slow, not the fastest. They would force you to register for a certification course.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good placement facilities available.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure and facilities are available, including Wi-Fi with unlimited access, labs with advanced equipment, and separate departments and classrooms. Hostel facilities are also good, and the food quality is acceptable. Medical facilities are available, and sports and games are conducted regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Best college, 100% satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: College architecture is good; its campus and buildings are attractive. But the lecture schedule is hectic; we have back-to-back lectures without breaks. Wi-Fi, good labs, and a library are the basic facilities available at the college. The college hostel is good; we have a butterfly garden on campus. In the hostel mess, the food is average in quality and taste. The canteen's seating arrangement is good, and they offer good-quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Srinivas Institute of Technology, Srinivas Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: Events and fests happen in the college. A lot of enjoyment and memories are made, and parallelly we go with proper studies and daily practice the subjects. Mess food is not bad; we adjust to the food. Transportation is easy from the campus. Games are much more played in the college house only.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a brand of excellence.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is better than our college surroundings and the classroom, library, and labs are also very neatly located in our college hostel. Facilities are also available in our hostel at any time. The canteen also has very good sports hours. We are enjoying a lot in our college.

college_info.intro:
NIELIT Aurangabad offers BTech, Diploma, MTech, and certification programs to interested candidates. The admissions are made through the entrance exam. For BTech, JEE Main entrance exam is required, MTech admissions are made through the GATE entrance exam followed by CCMT counselling, however, admission to a diploma can be made through merit upon meeting the NIELIT Aurangabad eligibility criteria. Given below is the list of popular programmes offered at NIELIT Aurangabad:
For more details about courses of NIELIT Aurangabad, check out below video:

placements.overview: The institute arranges multiple visits of the students in leading industries so that they get well-versed with the corporate trend. In addition to this, students also get an opportunity to work on industrial issues in their projects. The key highlights of National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Aurangabad placements for BTech and MTech are tabulated below:

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters at NIELIT Aurangabad placements?

faqs.answer: A:    After completing the education in Electronics Engineering, some of the students opt for a Master’s programme in specialisations like Telecommunication, Microelectronics & VLSI Design, Signal Processing, Wireless Communication, Embedded Systems, Robotics, etc. While the others join the Core Engineering companies, where they get to work as Design Engineer, ASIC Engineer Trainees, Junior Embedded Engineers or Network Support Engineer. Students can also opt for non-core jobs as Quality Analyst
faqs.question: What are the career opportunities after completing Electronics Engineering from NIELIT Aurangabad?

faqs.answer: A:    NIELIT Aurangabad has not released official placement 2025 data for the BTech course. As per some of the verified reviews on Shiksha, students have mentioned that the highest placement package is INR 25 LPA. Some of the leading companies that have been part of placements in recent years are TCS, Bosch, Bajaj Auto, etc.
faqs.question: What is the highest placements package offered at BTech course at NIELIT Aurangabad?

faqs.answer: A:    According to NIELIT Aurangabad JEE Main cutoff 2025, the General AI category cutoff stood between 46118 and 57153. Only CSE and EE cutoffs were published by the institute. Between these two, the highest cutoff possess by BTech in CSE at a Round 3 closing rank of 46118. Likewise, for the OBC AI category, CSE remained the most competitive course at a closing rank of 18150.
faqs.question: Which branch at NIELIT Aurangabad has the highest cutoff 2025?

faqs.answer: A:    Students are chosen for the B.Tech. programme in NIELIT , Aurangabad using a variety of techniques, such as:Joint Entrance Examination (JEE) Main: The National Testing Agency (NTA) administers the JEE Main, a national entrance exam, to candidates seeking admission to engineering and architecture programs at various Indian universities.State-level entrance exams: A few states hold entrance exams specifically for state-level engineering college admission. For instance, the Maharashtra Common Entrance Test (CET) is required for enrollment in the state's engineering institutes.Direct entrance: Depending on a candidate's Class 12 results, certain universities also provide direct admission to B.Tech. programs.Depending on the school and the program, different minimum percentiles are needed for admission to B.Tech. programs. But generally speaking, a percentile of 75% or higher is regarded as favorable for admission to top engineering colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The best infrastructure and labs.

review_content.Placements: Ours was the first batch to graduate from this esteemed institute. At our time, there were only a few companies which had long-term committed tie-ups with our college with regards of placements/ internships and training purpose, which included Trimax, Verroc Industries, Sterlite Technology, and Videocon (DTH Manufacturing plant). Our college hosts many recruitment drives at various location in and around Aurangabad. Many students got an opportunity to work with the industrial experts in various industries in good cities like Pune, Nagpur, Bangalore (Tata). As the college is in Aurangabad which is considered as the main hub of industries (MIDC, Walunj), there is a fair chance of getting a good job in industries. The placement cell at NIELIT Aurangabad is capable enough to provide jobs not only to its students but also to students of other colleges as it conducts mega job fairs in this district.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Do not take admission here.

review_content.Placements: The first pass out batch for B.Tech was in 2019. The placement was around 5% with an average package of 25k per month. The companies that visited were local and mostly was employing for sales and marketing. In 2018, the number of placement increased to around 20% (most of the students didn't participate in the placement) with an average package of 18k per month. Companies like Naniko Pvt Ltd, Trimax and other local companies were there. Internship of six months is being provided in Siemens for the final year students. There is a placement cell in the college, but it is highly inefficient.

review_summary.college_name: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with our college and course.

content.Placements: Our college is for research and development in the field of electronics, so if you join this college for placements, then it is a little bit difficult. The highest salary package offered is 25 LPA. The average salary package offered is 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Intel, etc.
content.Infrastructure: We have very good labs for PCB designing. A VLSI lab, a 3D printing lab, a consumer electronics lab, an embedded system lab, a power electronics lab, a virtual networking lab, a fiber optics lab, etc., are available in our college. We have a very attractive hostel. We can access free Wi-Fi. It is available 24X7. The campus has a library.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Very ideal place for learning modern electronics.

content.Placements: Since the course is of core manufacturing, so it has having a very vast exposure in Electronics Industry. India is still far behind in the area of electronics manufacturing so this also gives students a very bright opportunity. A lot of MNC's n few local PCBs manufacturing companies also recruit young n dynamic engineers from here.
content.Infrastructure: Excellent n pleasant infrastructure. Well-equipped laboratory providing best practical knowledge. In campus mess n hostel facilities for both boys and girls. Well-equipped library and plenty of well knowed technical magazines for keeping the students updated of new technologies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The best infrastructure and labs.

content.Placements: Ours was the first batch to graduate from this esteemed institute. At our time, there were only a few companies which had long-term committed tie-ups with our college with regards of placements/ internships and training purpose, which included Trimax, Verroc Industries, Sterlite Technology, and Videocon (DTH Manufacturing plant). Our college hosts many recruitment drives at various location in and around Aurangabad. Many students got an opportunity to work with the industrial experts in various industries in good cities like Pune, Nagpur, Bangalore (Tata). As the college is in Aurangabad which is considered as the main hub of industries (MIDC, Walunj), there is a fair chance of getting a good job in industries. The placement cell at NIELIT Aurangabad is capable enough to provide jobs not only to its students but also to students of other colleges as it conducts mega job fairs in this district.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Do not take admission here.

content.Placements: The first pass out batch for B.Tech was in 2019. The placement was around 5% with an average package of 25k per month. The companies that visited were local and mostly was employing for sales and marketing. In 2018, the number of placement increased to around 20% (most of the students didn't participate in the placement) with an average package of 18k per month. Companies like Naniko Pvt Ltd, Trimax and other local companies were there. Internship of six months is being provided in Siemens for the final year students. There is a placement cell in the college, but it is highly inefficient.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Aurangabad.

content.Placements: This college is not too old, so there is a problem of recognition as many companies don't know about this college which is the main thing for a few placements here. Most of the students haven't received any job offer yet. However, in future placements will improve.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good in terms of hostel, roads and streets. Classrooms and other amenities of this college are average. The college authorities provide Wi-Fi connection with some restrictions, but the speed is good.

admission_overview.college_name: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Admission 2025: Cutoff, Application, Eligibility, Fees & Dates

paragraphs: Established in 1987, the National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology Aurangabad was founded with the objective of training students in the field of Information, Electronics and Communication Technology. The centre is co-located inside the campus ofDr Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada (BAM) University. The centre offers a varied range of nearly 35 short-term as well as long-term courses. BTech, MTech and PhD are the most sought-after courses of this centre and are affiliated with Dr BAM University.

NIELIT Aurangabad offers BTech, MTech, and Diploma programmes in Engineering and Technology. Further, it offers other short-term and long-term programmes in the fields of Technology, Science, Engineering, etc.
The list of majorNIELIT coursesoffered with the application status, eligibility and accepted entrance exam is presented below:
Eligibility Criteria
Entrance Exam
BTech in Electronics Engineering (System Engineering)
Class 12 pass in the relevant Science stream
JEE Mains/ CSAB Cousnelling
MTech in Electronics Design and Technology
BE / BTech with 60% (55% for reserved category) aggregate in electronics / Electrical / Telecommunication / Instrumentation
Diploma in Electronics Production and Maintenance
Class 12 pass with 35% aggregate in Mathematics and Science subjects
Entrance exam conducted by DTE
Download NIELIT Aurangabad admission brochure for formal programmes
NIELIT Aurangabad offers various degree, diploma and certificate programmes at UG, postgraduate and doctoral levels. The admission process of these courses is presented in brief below:

Candidates seeking admission to NIELIT Aurangabad's long-term courses must appear forNIELIT Exam. The duration of CHM programmes is six months and that of the rest of the programmes is one year. Candidates must satisfy the eligibility criteria of the course that they intend to apply for.

The centre also offers skill-oriented non-formal courses aligned with the National Skills Qualifications Framework (NSQF).Click here to view all the coursesalong with their eligibility criteria, duration and fees

courses_data.description: NIELIT Aurangabad offers a 4-year BE/BTech programme at the UG level. Students who meet the minimum eligibility criteria and have a valid score on the JEE Main exam can apply. Here is a quick summary of the key highlights for the NIELIT Aurangabad BE/BTech programme, including its eligibility, fees and dates:

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in NIELIT Aurangabad for BTech?
faqs.answer: No, there is no direct admission to BTech in NIELIT Aurangabad. You must qualify the JEE Main exam and go through JoSAA/CSAB counselling. Admissions are based on merit alone. There is no management quota or direct seat allocation.

faqs.question: Does NIELIT Aurangabad accept admission through JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Yes, NIELIT Aurangabad offers admission through JEE Main for BTech in Electronics Engineering. Shortlisted candidates need to attend JoSAA or CSAB counselling. It's a purely rank and seat-dependent admission. Early application is advised after results.

faqs.question: Is B.Tech costly at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology aurangabad?
faqs.answer: No, B.Tech is not costly at National institute of electronis and information technology Aurangabad. They charge from 2.1 Lacs to 3.2 Lacs per annum . According the college standards they charge at normal level where, it is worth joining by the fees offered by national institute of electronis and information technology Aurangabad.

courses_data.description: To get admission to MTech in Electronics Design and Technology in NIELIT Aurangabad, candidates should have a BE or BTech in the same discipline. A minimum aggregate mark of 60% is required, with a relaxed requirement to 55% for students from reserved category. Besides this, a valid GATE score is also a prerequisite.

faqs.question: Is there M.Tech in NIELIT Aurangabad?
faqs.answer: Yes, NIELIT Aurangabad also provides M.Tech in Electronics Design and Technology. The programme is affiliated to Dr BAM University and approved by AICTE. Admissions are done on the basis of GATE scores. It is a specialised postgraduate course in electronics systems design.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for M.Tech course at NIELIT Aurangabad?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the M.Tech course ranges from INR 1.92 Lacs to INR 2.16 lakh. M.Tech in Electronics Design and Technology is a 2 years AICTE-approved Postgraduate course, with the Degree awarded by Dr Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University, Aurangabad (MS). For admission to MTech, candidates must have a valid GATE score followed by CCMT counselling. There are 28 seats available for the students.

faqs.question: Can I get National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology B Tech with a 72 percentile in JEE Mains?
faqs.answer: As you have mentioned that you have secured 72 percentile in JEE Mains and taking into consideration that you belong to general category so let me tell you that predicted rank according to my knowledge will be around 2.5-3L.In this percentile you do not have any chances for good nits like Jamshedpur durgapur Silchar allahabad rourkela Calicut but if you belong to one of these home states like mizoram, Arunachal Pradesh, Meghalaya, Agartala, sringar then you may stand some chances to get a seat i

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

description: NIELIT Aurangabad cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NIELIT Aurangabad JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

NIELIT Aurangabad JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the NIELIT Aurangabad CSE cutoff 2025 was 110494 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the NIELIT Aurangabad B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 110494 and 166314 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 110494 and 166314, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at NIELIT Aurangabad. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at NIELIT Aurangabad to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of NIELIT Aurangabad. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and M.Tech. in Embedded System and VLSI Design with last round cutoff scores of 352 and 350, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 352. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 315 and 319 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college and course.
reviews.review_text: We have very good labs for PCB designing. A VLSI lab, a 3D printing lab, a consumer electronics lab, an embedded system lab, a power electronics lab, a virtual networking lab, a fiber optics lab, etc., are available in our college. We have a very attractive hostel. We can access free Wi-Fi. It is available 24X7. The campus has a library.

reviews.review_heading: Very ideal place for learning modern electronics.
reviews.review_text: Excellent n pleasant infrastructure. Well-equipped laboratory providing best practical knowledge. In campus mess n hostel facilities for both boys and girls. Well-equipped library and plenty of well knowed technical magazines for keeping the students updated of new technologies.

reviews.review_heading: The best infrastructure and labs.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is located on the university campus. Also, the main market is at a distance of 5-4 km away from the institute. The campus is around 18 acres and it is considered as one of the biggest colleges for a single branch (only electronic system engineering is offered in this college no other branches are available). The campus is CCNA certified, and the complete campus is Wi-Fi enabled, there is a separate lab for almost every subject. Full freedom is given to the students to perform ...

reviews.review_heading: Do not take admission here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is poor. Internet connectivity is a problem. The number of classrooms is not sufficient. The medical facility is provided. Sports and games facilities are good. The quality of labs is extremely bad, and there is a lack of components and space. The quality of food is the worst anyone can find in a college. Most of the students opted to live outside the hostel just because of the quality of food provided in the canteen. Hostel rooms are good but only for boys. The hostel is not ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good in terms of hostel, roads and streets. Classrooms and other amenities of this college are average. The college authorities provide Wi-Fi connection with some restrictions, but the speed is good.

reviews.review_heading: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Aurangabad
reviews.review_text: Very good. A lush green 18-acre campus and a perfect environment for better studies. The classrooms are spacious. The labs are very sophisticated and well equipped. we have got a CNC lab and a 3D printing lab which is the only lab that is located inside a college's premises all over India.

reviews.review_heading: It has a great scope for improvement in future, but as of now, performs mediocre.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite reputed. The campus is around 16-acres in the area with a lush greenery all around. There is just not a central Wi-Fi provided on the main college campus, but there are good labs like the software development lab or the model career centre with good internet and quite fast PCs. Most other labs are equipped with good components, and the PCB lab is the highlight of all. It offers opportunity to fabricate your own design on a PCB. The facilities like 3D printing, CNC mac...

reviews.review_heading: Be cautious before taking admission in this college. It could be dangerous for your career.
reviews.review_text:
The college infrastructure is really good. We have all the latest equipment and the only lab in the region for PCB manufacturing. All the components are provided for free if you want to do any project. All the lab assistants are really helpful.
The canteen is a real mess. The college is not able to manage a canteen for even 120 students. Daily, there is chaos over food quality and money.
You will not get any other eateries around or in the college. You have to walk 1.5 km even for getting a samo...

reviews.review_heading: College is quite good those who are interested in electronics.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure are not that much big but it's quite beautiful in particular seasons. Coming towards course it consists of various labs like digital electronics, analog electronics, power electronics, PCB, Embedded and IOT, Soc lab and done lab etc. Hostel is quite good. They provide good facilities and mess charges are 3600 per month for breakfast, lunch and dinner. Hostel charges are 10,500 per semester.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the marks I scored but dissatisfied because of the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not provide public Wi-Fi facility. If you want to use the internet regarding your studies, then you can go to the computer lab. Classrooms are large, but the crowd is less. Classrooms are not well maintained. The library is good and comfortable. There is a clinic, but there is no doctor in it. Our college provides ground only in sports week.

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at Wainganga College of Engineering and Management include BTech and MBA. The college offers a four-year BTech programme. overview_faqs.question: When was Wainganga College of Engineering and Management established?
overview_faqs.answer: Established in 2008, Wainganga College of Engineering and Management is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra. It is a private autonomous college with a dynamic vision. WCEM is recognised by the AICTE and accredited with 'A' Grade by the NAAC.The college offers undergraduate, postgraduate and diploma courses across Engineering, Management and Computer Application. The flagship courses offered at WCEM include BTech, MBA and MCA.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Power Electronics and Power Systems - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements.

content.Placements: Good companies visit the college for placements. All are friendly here. Top recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Smart Data, WCL, CEAT, R. Sandeesh Group, etc. The highest package offered is 19 LPA. 90% of students do internships in companies like NTPC, KTPS, Cognizant, and BSNL, so it is the best for students.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in hostels and the college. The mess quality is good. There are good medical facilities. A common room is available for both boys and girls. Sports and games are available to play, and college gives separate time for sports. The quality of education provided is good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Power Electronics and Power Systems - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Innovation, education, and transformation.

content.Placements: WCEM has an active training and placement cell that organizes soft skill workshops [ mock interviews, aptitude tests, and career counseling]. It also coordinated internships, placements, and campus recruitment drives. In 2024-25, over 80 companies participated in campus hiring drives.
content.Infrastructure: Approximately 12 acres with lush greenery and well-maintained open space. The main building resembles a white house aesthetic. Around 31 classrooms and seminar halls, ICT-enabled teaching aids, and design interactive learning. Stream -specific lab equipped with tools for digital electronics, microprocessor, VLSI, signal processing, CAD.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty, well-structured course.

content.Placements: Around 70 to 80% of the students from the AIDS batch were successfully placed during campus. The highest package is 7.2 LPA, and the average package is 2.4 LPA. Top companies like TCS, Capgemini, Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, LTI Hexaware, and Persistent are startup-like web stars in the IT network.

Overall, the infrastructure is good and continually improving to support both academics and student well-being.

admission_process.title: Wainganga College of Engineering and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Wainganga College of Engineering and Management admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Wainganga College of Engineering and Management is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Wainganga College of Engineering and Management Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website, i.e., https://www.wcem.in/apply-now-form, for admission to the various programmes. Candidates can fill out the application form on the college's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The university considers various entrance exam scores, such as JEE Main, GATE, etc, for admission to the BTech, MTech courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite scores of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theWainganga College of Engineering and Management feeto confirm their seats in the college.

hostel_campus.college_name: Wainganga College of Engineering and Management Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in hostels and the college. The mess quality is good. There are good medical facilities. A common room is available for both boys and girls. Sports and games are available to play, and college gives separate time for sports. The quality of education provided is good.

reviews.review_heading: Innovation, education, and transformation.
reviews.review_text: Approximately 12 acres with lush greenery and well-maintained open space. The main building resembles a white house aesthetic. Around 31 classrooms and seminar halls, ICT-enabled teaching aids, and design interactive learning. Stream -specific lab equipped with tools for digital electronics, microprocessor, VLSI, signal processing, CAD.

reviews.review_heading: It is quite good if students are looking for moderate colleges for a quick degree.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi access is quite good, and the food is moderate as well. Access to sports is good. I don't know about the hostel as I used to travel from my home. Classrooms are quite clean, and the vented labs are not that well-equipped. Some computers are working, and some are not.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent platform for quality education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. All facilities required for the M.Teach Department are available, such as well-equipped laboratories, classrooms, a comprehensive library, reliable Wi-Fi connectivity, etc. Other facilities are also available, like boys' and girls' hostels, a canteen, and a Sports Department.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, well-structured course.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are available separately for boys and girls with good security and a decent study environment. Rooms are mostly shared by two or three students, cleaned regularly, and have amenities such as water purifiers and wardrobes. Overall, the infrastructure is good and continually improving to support both academics and student well-being.

reviews.review_heading: Review of a B.Tech college.
reviews.review_text: It has 12 acres campus with modern infrastructure like spacious, ventilated classrooms with audio-visual aids, a well-stocked digital library, computer centre with high-speed internet, and numerous labs across branches. The hostel environment is supportive, rooms come furnished with essential amenities, and Wi-Fi access extends to hostels (though mess facilities are paid separately).

reviews.review_heading: Review of Wainganga College of Engineering and Management (WCEM), Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: College campus was well maintained and spread out offering a peaceful environment. Infrastructure was above average compared to many regional colleges in Nagpur. Hostel facilities were available for both boys and girls. Rooms were spacious with basic amenities like beds, study tables, fans and attached bathrooms. Food was served through an on campus mess and quality was average.

reviews.review_heading: Mesmerizing memories can be made in Wainganga College of Engineering and Management.
reviews.review_text: The college had well-maintained labs and library. The washrooms were well cleaned, and daily cleaning of the washrooms was performed. The classrooms where students sat were better planned. There was hostel facility for boys, although the rooms were well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Good choice for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure with a well-equipped lab of materials, and a special computer lab available in all departments. Good quality of food provided by canteen. First aid medical facilities, cricket ground, basketball, and volleyball ground are provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent place of education.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-equipped computer labs, Wi-Fi connections, and CNC machines and other instruments which are required for practical. The college also has its software, as it is required for our courses. Our college has a well-maintained hostel, separate hostel is there for boys and girls, and it has spacious and comfortable rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Wainganga College of Engineering and Management review.
reviews.review_text: College has decent infrastructure for engineering courses, including well-equipped labs for Computer Science, Electronics, Mechanical, and Civil branches, smart classrooms with projectors, a central library with good reference material, and campus-wide Wi-Fi. There are dedicated computer labs with updated software and internet access for project work. The hostel facilities are average to good, with separate accommodation for boys and girls, basic furnished rooms, 24-hour security, a mess serving...

reviews.review_heading: It's satisfactory because of the faculty. The college campus and infrastructure are very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course is very good. In college, separate departments for different fields are available. Hostel is very good, and the facilities available from food to medical. They have a canteen, which is very good for the students. Apart from this, sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is excellent, and faculty members are highly qualified.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent, with well-equipped labs that give practical knowledge. The canteen facility is available with the best quality meals in an air-conditioned. The college building infrastructure is attractive. There is a ground and greenery environment on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good overall.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the college were really good. Classrooms were well-organized, and good library with enough course-related content available. The food quality in the mess and the canteen was also really good.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at Wainganga College of Engineering and Management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very impressive and big. It just looks like a Taj hotel. There are various facilities like a Wi-Fi connection, a library, and more than 50 classrooms according to their department. Various facilities are available in the hostel.

college_info.intro:
DIT University Admission Office provides diverse range of programmes to students. University offers BTech and MBA programme to students as its flagship courses. Courses are offered for duration of 4 & 2 years, respectively. DIT University Office courses offered in full time mode in several specialisations. BTech students are placed in top companies in top sectors like Palo Alto Networks, Amazon, Microsoft, Deloitte, KPMG, IBM, Optum, and others. They can work as Software Engineers, Data Scientists or take up various jobs relevant to their stream.
DIT University Admission Office courses strive to enhance learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check popular programmes offered at DIT Dehradun Admission Office in the table provided below:

fees_overview.description: Aspiring students wishing to join DIT University - Admission Office are required to pay a certain amount as fees. DIT University - Admission Office fee structure for all courses consists of various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee, etc. Among these components, some are to be paid only once during DIT University - Admission Office admission, while the remaining are charged according to the fee guidelines. admission_overview.college_name: DIT University - Admission Office Course Admission 2026: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: DIT University - Admission Office Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: DIT University - Admission Office admission is a blend of merit and entrance-based, depending on the course selected by the student. The university offers a wide range of courses across several fields, such as Engineering, Science, Pharmacy, Design, Arts, Management, and more. These courses are provided at the undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and diploma levels. Students fulfilling the admission criteria can apply online. The application process for the university commences online. DIT University - Admission Office accepts several national-level entrance exam scores for admission to some of its courses. Interested students can read the following article to learn all about the admission process, criteria, and other admission-relevant information for the university. Download DIT University - Admission Office Brochure

eligibility_selection.title: DIT University - Admission Office Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: DIT University - Admission Office course admission is subject to the fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. Students wishing to get into any of the courses offered at the institute are required to satisfy both the minimum educational qualifications along with the selection rounds. The university shortlists candidates on a merit basis for several programmes, such as BPT, BMLT, etc. Additionally, for courses, such as BTech, MTech, MBA, etc., candidates need to appear for the accepted entrance exam followed by any further rounds of selection as prescribed by the university.

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with 4 subjects-Physics, Mathematics, English and best one of the remaining subjects with at least 50%-60% aggregate in Class 10 and Class 12

B.E/ BTech in relevant specialisations with at least 55% aggregate
BPharm with at least 55% aggregate

faqs.answer: DIT University - Admission Office's selection criteria are both merit and entrance-based. The university admits candidates either on the basis of the merit secured in the last qualifying examination. The university accepts several national-level entrance examinations, such as GATE, UGC NET, MAT, CAT, etc. Students with valid UKSEE scores may also apply for selective courses. Further, the final selection is done based on counselling conducted by the university. For merit-based admissions, candidate's marks in the last qualifying exam are considered.
faqs.question: What is the selection criteria of the DIT University - Admission Office?

faqs.answer: DIT University - Admission Office eligibility criteria require candidates to complete the last qualifying exam from a recognised board/ university/institution. For those wishing to join the university's undergraduate courses, candidates need to have passed Class 12 from a recognised board. Similarly, for postgraduate admissions, students need to complete graduation from a recognised. For more information, students can connect with the admission desk of DIT University - Admission Office.

admission_process.title: DIT University - Admission Office Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: DIT University - Admission Office's admission procedureinvolves several steps, starting from application, followed by selection, and admission confirmation. Check below the admission steps forDIT University Admission Office Dehradun:
Online Application
The mode of application is online for all courses. students need to pay an application fee to apply for admission.
Selection Rounds

The university shortlists students based on their merit or entrance exam scores. DIT University Dehradun also conducts DUET for shortlisting aspirants for MPharm, M.Tech and PhD courses. The university conducts other selection rounds, like GDPI or PI rounds for some of the specific courses. However, for PhD who have a valid score GATE / SET / SLET will be selected based on PI.
Counselling & Admission Confirmation
After the completion of the selection rounds, students are called for merit-based counselling and document verification. Selected students need to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

hostel_campus.college_name: DIT University - Admission Office Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel accommodation comprises of American style apartments which are well furnished, hygienic and have ultramodern amenities. Each apartment has three rooms shared by two students each, a lobby and attached bathrooms. The hostel premises has common TV room, tuck-shops (having stationary, barber, bakery, juice etc. shops) and state of the art indoor and outdoor sports facilities. The entire hostel premises are Wi-Fi enabled and has a separate computer centre with 24X7 internet facility. There are four in-campus boys' hostel viz. Raman, Bose, Bhabha and Sarabhai with a total capacity of accommodating around 1,200 boys. University also has a separate in-campus Girls’ Hostels viz. Sarojini Girls’ Hostel which can accommodate around 900 girl students. Students can also watch their favourite TV Channels on numerous TVs with DTH connections which are available in all the hostels. All hostel blocks are equipped with solar water heaters with heating elements which provide warm water in the hostels all year round.

library.description: Centrally air-conditioned library equipped with all Indian and foreign author books and over 1 Lakh books, over 3500 CDs/DVDs, subscribes to more than 202 journals/magazines in print and subscribes to more than 5000 e-journals

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Volleyball, Table Tennis

The hostel premises also has tuck-shops (having bakery, juice etc shops). The food served is of high quality and meets the acceptable quality standards of as laid down under FSSAI and other Govt food safety regulations.
