reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A beautiful college that can make you successful, and cheerful, and which brings u life.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% of the total strength got placements yearly. For our branch, the highest package obtained is 15 lakhs per year. The lowest package is around Rs. 22,000. Shobha Construction, Aarbee Structures, and L&T are the top recruiting civil-based companies. Companies also provide internship opportunities for those interested.
review_content.Infrastructure: Telling about infrastructure, our college is top-rated. Classrooms are provided with projector facilities. There are seminar halls and placement halls, which are well-maintained. Also,o for practical studies, there are many more labs like the MT lab, the GE lab, the CSA lab, etc. There's a huge library in our college, a main library, and several department libraries are also there. The hotel facilities are also good. Especially the college canteen provides us with a special treat of meals every day.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Gcek- the best engineering college in northern Kerala.

review_content.Placements: The placements offered by Government College of Engineering Kannur were lesser last year compared to previous years. One of the students from Electronics and Communication received an 18 LPA package. The average package in GCEK is 4 LPA. There is an active placement cell to prepare students for placement drives.
review_content.Infrastructure: GCE Kannur has well-equipped labs and workshops for all departments. The college has Wi-Fi available in the main block. Labs and classrooms are high-tech. There is a main library and individual libraries for departments. Regarding the hostel, we have 3 blocks (A, B, C) for girls and two blocks (A, B) for boys. Hostel admission is based on government norms (family income, distance from home, academic performance). The quality of food provided is very good. We have non-veg available on almost 4-5 days per week. There is a hospital located 100 meters from the boys' hostel. The boys' hostel has basketball and volleyball courts, as well as indoor sports like table tennis.

review_summary.college_name: GCEK Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It has a really good hostel and infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 10 students get placed. The top recruiting company is L&T. Placements are comparatively low here. Students with above-average CGPA get placements. In overall departments, there are placements. But compared to CET and GECT, placements here are low.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi in the college and hostels. There are required labs with good facilities. The quality of food available at the hostel is great. Facilities and qualities of the hostel are impressive. The most important thing is the hostel provides quality food.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Advanced Manufacturing and Mechanical Systems Design - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Happy with college faculty, placement, and facilities.

content.Placements: In terms of placement, college is good. J&J, Tata Motors, Indian Oil, Adani Limited, and L&T companies are recruiting students. Nearly about 90% of students got placed. I also got offer but was interested to start my venture so I rejected my job offer. The average package is 6.5 LPA. In internships college is not doing well, with almost no internship offer from on campus.
content.Infrastructure: College is very old so infrastructure is not well. One big problem is there is no lift so we have to walk by ourselves. College is very strict, ragging is almost zero, and we have free Wi-Fi and LAN for laptops. Library is also available. Hostel is good sharing room are offered. It have internet, mess is very affordable, and water filters are everywhere. In canteen only breakfast is available, options are very less.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A beautiful college that can make you successful, and cheerful, and which brings u life.

content.Placements: Around 50% of the total strength got placements yearly. For our branch, the highest package obtained is 15 lakhs per year. The lowest package is around Rs. 22,000. Shobha Construction, Aarbee Structures, and L&T are the top recruiting civil-based companies. Companies also provide internship opportunities for those interested.
content.Infrastructure: Telling about infrastructure, our college is top-rated. Classrooms are provided with projector facilities. There are seminar halls and placement halls, which are well-maintained. Also,o for practical studies, there are many more labs like the MT lab, the GE lab, the CSA lab, etc. There's a huge library in our college, a main library, and several department libraries are also there. The hotel facilities are also good. Especially the college canteen provides us with a special treat of meals every day.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Gcek- the best engineering college in northern Kerala.

content.Placements: The placements offered by Government College of Engineering Kannur were lesser last year compared to previous years. One of the students from Electronics and Communication received an 18 LPA package. The average package in GCEK is 4 LPA. There is an active placement cell to prepare students for placement drives.
content.Infrastructure: GCE Kannur has well-equipped labs and workshops for all departments. The college has Wi-Fi available in the main block. Labs and classrooms are high-tech. There is a main library and individual libraries for departments. Regarding the hostel, we have 3 blocks (A, B, C) for girls and two blocks (A, B) for boys. Hostel admission is based on government norms (family income, distance from home, academic performance). The quality of food provided is very good. We have non-veg available on almost 4-5 days per week. There is a hospital located 100 meters from the boys' hostel. The boys' hostel has basketball and volleyball courts, as well as indoor sports like table tennis.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My dream college-GCE Kannur.

content.Placements: Only about 20 to 30 students get placed this year. In the electrical branch, L&T was the core company and came with a package of 6 LPA. Internships are done by the students themselves in the nearby keltron and substation. Mainly, we are placed in software roles, like developing and testing, which are very rare.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is one of the best thing. And it was also one of the reason I joined college. It was well structured with labs, departments, auditoriums, stadiums, etc. Our hostels are some of the best hostel with hygiene food and all other facilities. Our canteen food was also very tasty and cheap. It was with quality food at cheap price.

Each department has separate classrooms, and there are libraries for academic use.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government College of Engineering Kannur.
reviews.review_text: Our college boasts a really impressive infrastructure, even when compared with the nearby engineering colleges in the Malabar region. It was commented as having labs of the level equal to IITs and NITs by the team visiting us from the NBA accreditation team.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best emerging colleges in Kerala.
reviews.review_text: Excellent facilities. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus and in hostels as well. The food in the mess is average. Canteen food is cheap and pretty good as well. Excellent facilities for all kinds of indoor and outdoor sports. The labs are fully air conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: Our college gives good vibes to students.
reviews.review_text: High-quality Wi-Fi is provided in the college and hostel. Labs are very good with high-quality instructors and instruments. Classrooms are good and have very good infrastructure. Library has all types of books related to academic studies and extracurricular learning. Hostels have different grounds and a good mess.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our college, library is very good. Wi-Fi facility is available. Laboratory is well-equipped. The food served in the hostel is better. Hostel rooms are comfortable and well-ventilated.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has an average campus with good facilities, but the exposure is pretty low.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is excellent. The hostel facility is average, but it is pretty decent. It is a huge campus with 73 acres of land, but lots of facilities are not used and a lot of space is wasted. Almost all facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for an amazing campus life and good placements, GCEK is a good choice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Lab facilities are average. The campus is good but small. Digital classrooms are provided. A digital library is available for everyone. Free Wi-Fi is available on campus. The canteen food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is rich in heritage and ambiance.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good in this college. Our campus facilities are better. The hostel is very old and it provides low-grade rooms. The mess facility is average. The food is south Indian and non-vegetarian food is available 3 days every week. The canteen facility is also available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: This college is an excellent place for an engineer.
reviews.review_text: Sports and games facilities available on campus are badminton court, basketball court, cricket ground, football ground, and table tennis. We have civil engineering lab, chemistry lab, computer lab, electrical lab, electronics lab, mechanical lab, and physics lab. Both boys' and girls' hostels are very good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has a huge campus with a lush green environment. There are proper blocks for each stream of engineering with well-established laboratories and workshops. The campus further invested in its infrastructure and got NBA accreditation in 2017 for EEE, ME, CE and ECE courses. Hostel facilities are outside the main campus. The ladies' hostel is only 200 meters from our college's main entrance, and the men's hostel is 1.5 km away from the college. Bus facilities are provided for day scholars...

reviews_list.review_title: College is okay, placement is average, and campus life is good.

review_content.Placements: Dr. Ssb Uicet offers three courses: B.E. (chemical), B.E. (food teaching), and integrated B.E. (chemical) with MBA. The placement of my college is varying according to branch of chemical 4th year placement is approximately 90-95% placement; integrated B.E. with MBA placement is 65-75% placement; and food teaching is 45-50% placement. After COVID placement is down, the average package is INR 5.5 lac per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department is located on the Panjab University campus, so the facilities and infrastructure are very good. AC Joshi Library is 24*7 available for studying. Student hostel food is good, but hostel infrastructure is not so good. The medical and sports facilities at my college are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members have a bad attitude.

content.Placements: I am in 3rd year currently in this Institute in chemical engineering. It's a good college if you are good at study or passionate about chemical engineering. Otherwise, if your dreams are different, like other than a chemical engineer, then this college will depress you.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are good, but many pieces of equipment are not working and have been in that condition for many years. No one takes responsibility for fixing them. The hostels are good, but it is difficult to get accommodation if your merit is low or if you are not involved in campus activities or politics.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best college life with fewer fees.

content.Placements: Dr. SSBUICET Punjab University Chandigarh provides a course on BE chemical, food technology, and an integrated chemical MBA course. Around 98.5% of students get placed in chemical engineering. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. The average salary package offered is around 6 LPA - 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Reliance Industries, Honeywell, Jubilant Ingrevia, GAIL, Technip, ExxonMobil, IOCL, Infosys, and many more. Nearly 50-60% of students get internships in these companies only. Top roles offered are research engineer, production engineer, data analyst, and consultant.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best for chemical engineering.

content.Placements: Our batch has 87 students. The placements stats have seen an increase from last year. The placement rate was 90% before 2020, but due to corona, it went down. But now, it's increasing again, and we hope that the placements will be good in the coming years.

library.description: The Library has a rich collection of 6.4 lakh publications comprising books, bound volumes of journals, theses/dissertations, rare books, reports, government documents, back files of newspapers, and a prized collection of 1490 manuscripts.It is fully computerized.It has been subscribed to about 600 current periodicals and has access to 225 Online fulltext journals as part of print journals subscription. Also access to approximately 5000 online fulltext journals, is available through INDEST- Consortium and UGC- INFONET.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Physics Lab, Research Lab

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members have a bad attitude.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good, but many pieces of equipment are not working and have been in that condition for many years. No one takes responsibility for fixing them. The hostels are good, but it is difficult to get accommodation if your merit is low or if you are not involved in campus activities or politics.

reviews.review_heading: Best college life with fewer fees.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the department is not up to the mark. Labs are well-equipped and furnished. The campus has access to 24/7 Wi-Fi. The department has a library. There is a central library named Joshi Library. It is air-conditioned. The hostel is quite nice. There is no restriction on the exit and entry of the hostel at any time. The taste and quality of the mess and canteen food is quite good. The dispensary is available on campus for medical facilities. Students have the access to the PU gr...

reviews.review_heading: College is okay, placement is average, and campus life is good.
reviews.review_text: The department is located on the Panjab University campus, so the facilities and infrastructure are very good. AC Joshi Library is 24*7 available for studying. Student hostel food is good, but hostel infrastructure is not so good. The medical and sports facilities at my college are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good placements, facilities and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Good Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms are available. Air-conditioned facilities are not available in classrooms. Not all the students get hostel, only 30% of the meritorious students who scored well in JEE get the hostel seats. Medical facilities are free. Sports are conducted here.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for chemical engineering.
reviews.review_text: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The college is situated in one of the best cities in India, Chandigarh, and it makes the college even more beautiful. The campus is lush green. The college has well-furnished classes. An auditorium and several labs are available. Mess food is of good quality, and the mess menu is revised regularly.

reviews.review_heading: The oldest and the most affordable engineering college in India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is old as this college was built in 1958. The building is the same as it was in 1958 with a little bit of reconstruction and new AC lecture halls added in recent time, but otherwise, all classes are non-AC, and the benches are made up of wood. The hostel is also the same old, but it's guaranteed you will enjoy your life at the hostel and department too.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good facilities and placements for 2022.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi is available, and it provides free access to various research papers as well. AC Joshi library is provided near UICET and contains a wide variety of books, which are accessible to all students. There is also a department library and students can issue books easily.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the cheapest engineering college in India.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is old as this building is built in 1958. There are 12 lecture halls, one auditorium, and different labs. Most of the boys have been assigned Bh-3 and Gh-1 for girls, both these hostels are the oldest. Rooms are small but you will enjoy your hostel.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges for chemical engineering.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. Chemistry labs are well maintained, Wi-Fi is provided all over the campus. Classrooms are okay. The library is good. Hostels are not so well maintained, especially for boys. Mess is average. Sports departments are good. Gymnastics and a swimming pool are provided on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Specialized chemical engineering college with affordable fees in the beautiful city of Chandigarh.
reviews.review_text: The college building is very big and there are spacious parks around. Well-equipped labs with industrial standards. Also, the campus is very beautiful with a good crowd. There is a big library with air-conditioned rooms and plenty of books. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled with decent speed. Hostels are not much good. Small rooms with just slow-running fans. The mess food is average. But there are many better options for food around campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of infrastructure, ROI, and an environment with exposure.
reviews.review_text: Our college is located at the center of Punjab University. Our college is in Chandigarh so it covers a better view. According to me, Punjab University's infrastructure is above the level with modern infrastructure. Our college is surrounded by STUCEE and Gandhi Bhawan which is the best location for the entire PU. College provides Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Most important is that our college gives a card for AC Joshi library which is the biggest library for the entire Panjab Universi...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for exposure and best for developing confidence, stage fear, etc.
reviews.review_text: There is a hostel facility, and a library is 24X7 open. We also have mess facility and sports ground which is very important for physical health. Hostels are provided only to a few students according to their ranks in JEE Mains and others are adjusted to PG. PG is more expensive than a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college which provides good knowledge and placements at a low cost.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is equipped with Wi-Fi, which gives good speed. The classrooms are old but are well-equipped with the required necessities. Labs are well-equipped with all the instruments. A pilot plant is also being used to enhance the knowledge of students.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best chemical engineering college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is provided to every student, and the labs of every core subject are also available in our college. The infrastructure in the classrooms is pretty much fine. There are two libraries, among which one is in the college. Another library is situated in front of the college, which is air-conditioned and is named Joshi library. From that library, you can borrow another four books, and it is the university's library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is more than satisfactory and has great value for money.
reviews.review_text: Despite being one of the oldest departments in the university, the infrastructure is pretty good here. Our department is located in the centre of the university near to the university library and stuck. There is a Wi-Fi facility all over the campus. The labs are well-equipped with all the essential equipment. The department has its own library and auditorium as well. The quality of food served is good in the hostel. Every hostel has common rooms with well-furnished sofas, indoor games and a TV. ...

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Dr. S. S. Bhatnagar University Institute of Chemical Engineering and Technology

likes.text: Companies like Technip Energies, Reliance, ExxonMobil, Honeywell, HMEL, IOL, etc., visit our campus every year.
I can never forget the essence of the first job which is the product of hard work of the college's placement officers.

likes.text: I opted for this course because B.E in chemical engineering is an upcoming stream in India, which has a great scope in India and outside India.

faqs.answer: A:    Many top international companies having presence in India hire electrical engineers and offer them handsome salary packages. Some of the top recruiters are given here:Larson & ToubroTata Electric CompaniesSterlingSchneider ElectricCrompton GreavesSiemensExide Industries LimitedMellcon Engineers
faqs.question: What are some of the top recruiters hiring Electrical Engineers?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Electronics Engineers are also recruited by the DRDO. The organisation releases notification in case of any requirement or vacancy in the pertinent discipline. The recruitement to DRDO is done on the basis of an open-recruitment process which attracts the brightest minds and experienced candidates from the country.
faqs.question: Can an Electronics Engineer get a job in DRDO?

faqs.answer: A:    Well, yes. There are a good number of job openings for BTech Electrical Engineering graduates because of the ever-growing demand for electricity by the growing population. As everything today runs on power, with technological advancements taking place every day and the focus on renewable energy and smart power grids, the need for Electrical Engineering graduates is quite high in the professional world.
faqs.question: Are there enough job openings for BTech Electrical Engineering graduates?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sanaka Educational Trust's Group of Institutions provides Full Time programs at the UG and After 10th levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Architecture & Planning, and have a fee structure of around INR 36,000 to 4,40,800. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Arch and B.Pharma. Further, the After 10th programs include After 10th Diploma.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Sanaka : a path of learning.

review_content.Placements: Almost 85% students got placed through the college campusing. The highest package offered was 12 LPA for the role of FRONTEND DEVELOPER by BYJU'S. Many others companies comes to offer jobs such as TCS, INFOSIS, WIPRO, etc. With a starting package of 4 LPA. A student can expect an average package of 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides a huge campus with a lot of amenities for the students such as free Wi-Fi, swimming pool, subject wise lab, projector classrooms, gyms, playgrounds, canteen, etc. The hostel rooms are quite good as they provide both AC & NON-AC rooms. The quality of the hostel food is average. But there are several others options available such as mess and college canteen. There is 24*7 medical facility available for the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sanaka Educational Trust's Group of Institutions.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of students are placed. The salary package offered is 6 LPA. Government and private companies came to our campus. They provided great opportunities for all eligible students. Indian Army also recruits students here. Approximately 70% of students got internships at Tata Motors.
review_content.Infrastructure: Modern and digital classrooms, labs, and the library are good. Wi-Fi is available 24X7. The quality of food is average.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. Most of them have M.Tech. degrees from NITs. Their teaching quality is good and easy to understand. This course is relevant. It makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are very difficult to pass. 30% is the pass percentage.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.
faqs.question: Q: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?

faqs.answer: The syllabus for the B Tech EE course focuses on both aspects because they are equally important for you to do well at the workplace in the future. There are theory classes to make you understand the meaning and workings of the Electrical Engineering concepts, and practical lab work and industrial training to give you a glimpse of the real-world applications.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: Does the BTech Electrical Engineering syllabus focus more on theory or practical application?

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good campus with decent placement.

content.Placements: Around 70-80% of B. Pharma students got placed. The highest package is 6 LPA, average salary is around 3.5 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. Top recruiters included Cipla, Sun Pharma, and Dr. Reddy's. Internships in 60% cases, mainly in QA, QC, and production roles. It provides very good placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our B.Pharma department has smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, and a rich library. Hostels are decent with good hygiene, mess food is average, and medical aid is available 24X7. There are ample sports and recreation facilities on campus, and also in very good condition.

content.Placements: About 50% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA. The average salary package offered is 2.50 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 1.70 LPA. Almost 50% of students got internships from our course.

content.Faculty: All teachers are highly educated and knowledgeable. Some teachers are very helpful. The pass percentage is 90%.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sanaka Educational Trust's Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Sanaka Educational Trust’s Group of Institutions has separate hostels for boys and girls. The food stuff served at the hostels has been acclaimed to be of a very high standard. Special food items are served on special occasions and a grand feast is arranged at the end of every month. The hotels have indoor sports facilities including table tennis, carom, volley ball, badminton, and multi-gym while the common rooms are provided with cable connection. Hostels are also equipped with broadband internet facilities and communication centers with STD/ISD and FAX services operating round the clock cater to the students' personal requirements

library.description: Sanaka Educational Trust’s Group of Institutions has a central library with a huge collection of technical books, periodicals, video films, Indian standards, general magazines and other publications related to each and every aspect of engineering and its related subjects.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Football, Cricket, Table Tennis, Volleyball, Badminton, Swimming

reviews.review_heading: Good campus with decent placement.
reviews.review_text: Our B.Pharma department has smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, and a rich library. Hostels are decent with good hygiene, mess food is average, and medical aid is available 24X7. There are ample sports and recreation facilities on campus, and also in very good condition.

reviews.review_heading: A nice college campus with good faculty members, placement in 2024, facilities, studies, etc.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a huge campus with a lot of amenities for students such as free Wi-Fi, a swimming pool, a subject-wise lab, projectors, classrooms, a gym, a playground, a canteen, etc. Hostel rooms are quite good as they provide both air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms. The quality of the hostel food is average. There are several other options available such as a mess and a college canteen. There is a 24/7 medical facility available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Sanaka : a path of learning.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a huge campus with a lot of amenities for the students such as free Wi-Fi, swimming pool, subject wise lab, projector classrooms, gyms, playgrounds, canteen, etc. The hostel rooms are quite good as they provide both AC & NON-AC rooms. The quality of the hostel food is average. But there are several others options available such as mess and college canteen. There is 24*7 medical facility available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sanaka Educational Trust's Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Modern and digital classrooms, labs, and the library are good. Wi-Fi is available 24X7. The quality of food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi, but students don't know the password. Sports and medical facilities are good, but the canteen facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: The fee structure is cheap with concerning other colleges with good academics.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a free Wi-Fi zone but it is fully not true, work is going on it. Our laboratories are good but the computers are not modified. Classrooms are good and it has single sit benches. Our library is good and it is under AICTE. There are many books in the library. The food served in the canteen is good. Hospital is also available. It has a playground, and there are two coaches for football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college with high rate of placements.
reviews.review_text: There is a good and well-maintained laboratory for B.Pharma students. Library is quite huge. Food quality is awesome and cricket can be played in sports. I love our college although never went because of the corona.

reviews.review_heading: I would love to recommend my juniors to join this beautiful college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is really good, and everything is quite good. Most of the time, I spend time in libraries. There are many books in our library, which are not only subjective but also knowledgeable books. The facilities in the hostel and college are really good, with a canteen and medical support.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent faculty members and a lush green campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure with a lot of areas covered with lush green trees. The canteen has average quality food but all other facilities are excellent. Wardens are available 24X7 for both boys as well as girls hostels. Wi-Fi and electricity facilities are available in the hostel all the time.

reviews.review_heading: SETGOI is a college of our dreams.
reviews.review_text: For this course, we have very advanced labs with hi-tech instruments. Classrooms are huge and there are a large number of books in the library. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. As this is a private college, the hostel costs are a little bit high, but there are big rooms. The canteen serves tasty foods at a reasonable price. We have huge playgrounds to play cricket and many others games.

reviews.review_heading: Placements and infrastructure are average, but faculty members and course curriculum are good.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is unhygienic without any proper food management. Prices are too high, and the quality is also not that good. Canteen seats are very low comparing to students. You have to be very fast or wait long to get a seat. Sometimes we miss our classes for this problem. Medical facilities are very good, and students are always under the supervision of great doctors. Our college has its own hospital, so students get the best medical supervision here.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, and Wi-Fi is available in the campus ground. Classrooms are good, and the library is very good. The whole college is clean. Our college campus has a small garden and swimming pool. Computer labs are also big, and each classroom has 100 computers. Our college canteen is good, and our college also has a hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Your life will get changed after meeting new friends here.
reviews.review_text: Our college has average classroom facilities and doesn't have smart classrooms. There are no properly organised laboratories, and management is the worst. Wi-Fi facility is not provided, and classrooms are dirty. The collection of books available in the library is limited, but gradually our college management is developing its infrastructure. Overall, I have a good experience here.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average in infrastructure and not good in terms of placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. Classrooms were good, but labs had very less equipment, so students work on the same equipment. I wasn't staying in the hostel, but I have heard in the first year that most of the students used to stay at the college hostel. After that, 10-15% of them stay only in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Try this college. Teachers are well educated and experienced.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, free Wi-Fi is provided by the college in the campus as well as in the hostel. Hostel is spacious and has the option of both AC and non AC. The quality of food in the canteen is good. Doctor is available in the campus 24*7 and College has its own playground.

review_summary.college_name: Government College of Engineering and Textile Technology, Berhampore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My college is so great, and gave me the opportunity to get introduced to the life of engineering.

content.Placements: Approximately 80% student were placed in my course. The highest package was 4.5 LPA, the average was 3 LPA, and the lowest was 1.7 LPA. The top recruits were Grupo Antolin Chakan Pvt Ltd and Sarda Motors. 50% of students got internships from Tata Power. The top role was quality inspector and operations.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, and the library were available for 24 hours. The hostel facility and food were too healthy and good, and emergency medicine was available in the college and hostel. Sports and games tools were also available. Annual sports were arranged every year to keep the students active.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with this college, don't come to this college if possible.

content.Placements: Mainly, textile technology department students are placed. Textile has the highest salary, 18 LPA, and the lowest is 1.5 LPA. Mainly textile-related companies are coming. No, IT companies have come in recent years. Textile students have an internship opportunity. The other branch internship was obtained from off-campus.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was okay. I am not a hosteler, that's why I cannot tell. In the hostel, senior-junior relationships are good enough, ragging-free. But not much capacity to provide a hostel for all students, so you stay in a PG or a mess around the college area.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is worth the money paid.

content.Placements: The placement rate is not very good. Trident, Arodek, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, etc., visit our college.
content.Infrastructure: All labs are air-conditioned and good. They have all the equipment. Our college has a common room for indoor games. It has an auditorium, a canteen, etc. The boys' hostel is not in our college. Its fee is Rs. 2,000 per month. It is around 1.5-2 km away from our college. There is a mess. It provides single occupancy rooms. The transport facility is available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 21 LPA. The average salary package offered is 7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, TCS, Aerotek, Cognizant, etc. Almost 40% of students got internships in different companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our department is good. Labs are equipped with air-conditioners. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. A huge library is available in our college. The hostels are very good and huge. The food served in the hostel is good compared to other hostels.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A decent college if you want to do B.Tech. at around INR 52,000.

content.Placements: In 2022, more than 50 percent got recruited, and this is also nearly the average recruitment every year from the computer science division. Unfortunately, placements are not very convincing and depend entirely on a student's credit and skills. If you are qualified, of course you will get a job; nothing comes without hard work. Average package offered in 2022 was around INR 3 LPA, the highest package was INR 10 LPA. The main recruiting companies in our college are IBM, Wipro, Infosys, Oracle, Cognizant, HCL, Hitachi, Voltas, Dystar, L&T Infotech, etc. Nearly 75 percent of the students get internships every year from their third year on. The top jobs offered are software engineering, web development, etc.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college if you want to do B.Tech. at around INR 52,000.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi services are available in colleges. The labs are in average working condition; do not expect to pursue a B.Tech. from here without your own personal computer (preferably a laptop). Classrooms are in good condition with whiteboard facilities (2nd year onwards). The college library has loads of books to refer to for different core and side courses. The hostel is in very good condition. However, you get hostel facilities only in your second year, and there is no hostel facility for girls. Foo...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government College of Engineering and Textile Technology, Berhampore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. After COVID, classrooms are good with fans and air conditioners, but for the lab facility, you've got to rely on your own laptop. The government has spent crores of rupees on Wi-Fi, but you have to use your mobile hotspot while you work on your laptop in college. The library also consists of 20-year-old books of no use. As technology is changing every day, our library doesn't have any books from recent years. Every room is quite spacious with 2 or 3 beds, a wardro...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and the seniors are perk of the college.
reviews.review_text: The computers of some of the labs are slow and not working properly (due to the long time not using it properly during the lockdown). People use to carry their own laptops in the labs. The classrooms are modern with projectors facility, proper bathrooms are in the college. The internet speed in the lab is horrible. Hostel is a good place to be for fun of the college life. They organise a lot of fun activities also the hostel charges are very low, the food of the hostel is also good and they orga...

reviews.review_heading: The campus is small, and the placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are average. Due to the lockdown, the facilities and infrastructure got degraded. Wi-Fi is only present in the students' common rooms. Laboratories are decent. Classrooms are big and have better technologies. The library was last upgraded in 2015.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members, placements, infrastructure, and facilities here are good.
reviews.review_text: About 80% of students were placed in our course. About 90% of students got internships from our course.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is equipped with a high-speed internet facility. The institute has a 24X7 Wi-Fi facility on the college campus for the student and faculty members to avail internet connection at any place in the college & faculty houses. The connectivity through a fully networked campus with state-of-the-art IT infrastructure, computing & communication resources offers students the facilities of e-mail, net surfing, up/down loading of web-based applications, besides helping them in preparing projects...

reviews.review_heading: This college infrastructure and facilities are good and up to mark and placements are decent.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very good for this course. The hostels are also very good and clean. The food is very good and is available in the mess and canteen for both vegetarians and non-vegetarians. The sports and games are very good in this college. Overall, it's good.

reviews.review_heading: Placements of our college are very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college is a well degisned and well furnished college. Every classroom has a projector. The whole campus uses a high network of Wi-Fi. The labs are so clean and filled with brand new machines. Canteen facilities are also available. The hostel is too good for living.

reviews.review_heading: Special IT companies are visiting our college, but the placements are s not good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel rooms are clean, large, air-conditioned, and have 24x7 electrical facilities. The meal quality is dependent on the students. Vegetables, curry, meat, eggs, and fish are available on the menu. But I repeat, it depends on the students. The hostel facility is good, but first-year students can't get a hostel room. This is one disadvantage. You can get a good room, mess, or PG in this college area. These facilities, excluding the meal charge, are available for a fee of around Rs. 2,000. Me...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government College of Engineering and Textile Technology, Berhampore.
reviews.review_text: The quality of classrooms and laboratories are very good, and the quality of food in the canteen is average. Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, laboratories, a library, etc. It is an excellent college to study in with sufficient classrooms, sufficient faculty members, and laboratory infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty and infrastructure. Most of our seniors are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: Our college is Wi-Fi enabled, classrooms are well decorated, and labs are also efficient. All the facilities are well in the college and hostel. The quality of food in the hostel canteen is very good. We have only a basketball playground in Murshidabad.

individual_reviews.title: Value for money, not for enjoyment.

content.Placements: You can take admission to this college for average campus life and average placements. The average package of this college for all departments is 3.5 LPA. The placements for the ECE department are very good. Last few years, the placements for the mechanical engineering department were 100%.
content.Infrastructure: There is no boys hostel present at Ujjain Engineering College. But there are 4 girls hostels. The infrastructure is very bad as this is a very old college. But for 1st year there is a new building for classes. In girls hostel, Wi-Fi, washing machines, and computers are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College is good enough for studies and fees.

content.Placements: As I am from EC department, placement record is good. Placement percentage is up to 80% in Ujjain Engineering College. The average package of this college for all departments is 3.5 LPA, and the good thing is the placement for mechanical department is 100%.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not good at all as the building is very old. Classrooms are not too good only fans are available. There are smart TV boards available for first-year students. Hostels are not available for boys in this college only one boys hostel is available. There are 4 girls hostel available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely best and value for money college.

content.Placements: About 82% of students are placed in our mechanical engineering department. The average package is about 5 LPA. Minimum package is 3 LPA, and maximum package is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Impetus, Volvo, Shakti Pump, Yash Technology, and UltraTech Cement.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has best infrastructure. Best labs facilities are available in the entire college. Our department is also in collaboration with IIT Indore. As our college is about 70 years old, its infrastructure is not up to mark. Canteen in our college is not so good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is only for studies and not for enjoying college life.

content.Placements: UEC offers BTech, MTech, and PhD in which the top percentile students are eligible to get admission in upper branches like computer science, electronics and communication, electrical engineering, and mechanical engineering. The average package offered is 3 LPA. Various companies like TCS, Volvo, Wipro, Infosys, etc., visit the college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: There is not too good infrastructure and a lack of stadiums and ports. In labs, there are good facilities for Wi-Fi, systems, and other equipment. The hostel is not good and doesn't have its own mess. We have to bring food from outside and there are no local shops near the hostel or college. For medical facilities, the college has its own dispensary. Some classes are too modern and some are just regular. In labs, there are also good faculty members who help us perform lab experiments.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
description: Ujjain Engineering College cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Ujjain Engineering College JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Ujjain Engineering College cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 106612 and 217633 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 106612, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 92251.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 106612.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

Considering the Ujjain Engineering College B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General AI category students were B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and B.E. in Electrical Engineering, with last-round closing ranks of 106612, 138085, and 199670, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely best and value for money college.

reviews.review_heading: It is only for studies and not for enjoying college life.

reviews.review_heading: The college has value for money and enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not available for boys, but there are four hostels for girls on the college campus. The college building's infrastructure is very old because it is a very old college. However, for first-year students, there is a new building for their classes. In the girls' hostel, there are Wi-Fi, washing machines, a computer, and a library available.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money, not for enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: Hostel are not available for boys but there are 4 hostels available for girls on college campus. Infrastructure of the college building is very old because it is a very old college. But for first-year students, there is a new building for their classes. In the girl's hostel, there is Wi-Fi, washing machines, computer, and library available.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for technology course in Ujjain .
reviews.review_text: In my college, facilities are not well-maintained. The main building is too old and needs to be renovated or repaired. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the college building, but the speed is very slow. Only first-year classrooms are well-maintained and smart; other classrooms are not smart or well-maintained, except for labs. The library is good and well-maintained, with all facilities. My college canteen experience is the worst ever.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good as it's a very old college. The building is old compared to new colleges. Wi-Fi is available in the college in every department. In hostels, there are sports facilities available: table tennis, volleyball, and badminton. New computers are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college as per the fee structure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not at all good. The classes are old for the 2nd, 3rd, and 4th years. For the 1st year, there was a building which was given by IIT Indore for the 1st year, along with some labs and the placement cell. There is no hostel available here; one old hostel is now closed.

reviews.review_heading: Best college with low fees.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and the departments are fully equipped with Wi-Fi facilities. And there is a central library where students can study and can issue books for their studies. Sports activities are also organized regularly, and the teams who perform well are selected for the higher level of the respective sports and awarded medals and trophies to the winners and also Certificates of Participation to everyone who plays.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied by faculty and good placement. Not good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The faculty are well-educated from well-known universities and colleges and have good teaching skills. They are supportive. There is Wi-Fi in the library for students and faculty. Classrooms are adequate. Labs are average.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of its affordable fees. Best college in Ujjain.
reviews.review_text: In my college, facilities are not well maintained. The main building is too old and needs to be renovated or repaired. Wi-Fi is available everywhere in the college building, but the speed is very slow. Only first-year classrooms are well maintained and smart; other classrooms are not smart or well maintained, except for labs. The library is good and well maintained, with all facilities. My college canteen experience is the worst ever.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college which is value for money.
reviews.review_text: It is a government college. While it doesn't have high-end infrastructure, it is manageable. New buildings are being constructed, and some old ones will be renovated. There is a small canteen that is a popular gathering spot.

reviews.review_heading: Very famous college of Madhya Pradesh for engineering is Ujjain engineering college.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities for us, like labs run by IIT Indore and a very big library that has Wi-Fi facilities and all types of books in it. Hostels are good for girls only; the hostel of our college is very bad; there are no such facilities there and very few seats available.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

faqs.answer: ECE courses do offer various electives for you to opt in the both the UG-level and PG-level ECE courses where you get the chance to pick a specific subject that interests you more, is easy-going for you, and in which you can even pursue a specialisation further to tailor your career path in a particular direction. You can choose to pick a subject according to the specialised field within your broad ECE specialization, which you would like to enter into in the future, where you see yourself as a well-established engineer. For example, in BTech ECE, there are a variety of electives like Embedded Systems, Antenna Design, Fiber-optic communication, VLSI Technology, etc.Know more about -ECE Courses Syllabus
faqs.question: Q: Are there any elective subjects in ECE courses?

faqs.answer: Hello aspirant! Some of the most important BTech Mechanical Engineering subjects that are covered at almost all the best colleges and universities in the country include Engineering Mechanics, Engineering Graphics and Design, Solid Mechanics, Thermodynamics, Manufacturing Processes, and Industrial and Automobile Engineering.All of these subjects will give you a lot of knowledge about the field of mechanical engineering that will eventually help you in the future when you enter into the job arena and prepare you well in advance.Please up vote if this answered your query.
faqs.question: Q: What are the important BTech Mechanical Engineering subjects covered in the syllabus?

review_content.Placements: Percentage of students getting offers is 80%, and most of the students who graduated from here are in the topmost companies in the whole world. The average package is LPA, and the highest package is 45 LPA. The best course is CSE AI & ML. Recruiting may depend on you.

review_summary.college_name: Sreenidhi University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028

content.Placements: We are the first batch of our college. They are providing good training for placements and internships. The curriculum for the training is very good and going very well. Many students are working for product based company and service based companies are holding training sessions.
content.Infrastructure: Coming to Infrastructure the classrooms, labs, and library are very good and well maintained. Classroom provides a digital clock and digital board and air conditioning for every class and labs contain very good equipment. Overall the infrastructure is very well maintained. Canteen has been developing a little bit as there are a few in 1st year so they are improving this year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Sreenidhi University has more memories and the best choice.

content.Placements: Sreenidhi Group of Institutions has 98% placements, with top recruiting companies like Infosys, Wipro, Microsoft, etc. These and several more companies offer opportunities for our course, and the majority of students get internships from different companies.
content.Infrastructure: Sreenidhi University has excellent infrastructure, with a spacious library for studying and well-maintained classrooms equipped with projectors for digital learning. The college has Chemistry and Physics labs, multiple computer labs, free Wi-Fi access in every classroom, and central AC in all classes. The hostel has spacious rooms with four-sharing, and the college provides a ground for playing games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Strong placements and modern infrastructure at SUH.

content.Placements: Percentage of students getting offers is 80%, and most of the students who graduated from here are in the topmost companies in the whole world. The average package is LPA, and the highest package is 45 LPA. The best course is CSE AI & ML. Recruiting may depend on you.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in this college are the best and there is no problem regarding students. They keep the best quality in Wi-Fi, classrooms, and library. The quality of the hostel mess is much better than a normal hostel in private, and they have the best rooms with rules to follow.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure.

content.Placements: We are the first batch in Sreenidhi University, so we don't have any idea about placements. Sreenidhi Institution of Technology has an excellent placement percentage. 93% of students are placed in good companies after their college.
content.Infrastructure: There is high-speed Wi-Fi available across the campus and in labs. There are well-equipped labs for practicing and exploring real-time experiments. Our classrooms have AC, projectors, and good audio-visual equipment for better learning.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am very happy to be at Sreenidhi University.

content.Placements: I am Sathwik Kumar from CSE AIML, presently pursuing my first year. Coming to placements, our seniors have got 90% of placements in top companies. Many of my seniors have done internships in companies like Wipro, Amazon, etc. The highest package in our university is 42 LPA and the lowest is 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: In my first year at Sreenidhi University, we have excellent infrastructure. Our university has a high-speed Wi-Fi system. The computer and physics labs are well organized. We have a library full of subject-related books, storybooks, magazines, comics, etc. The hostel facility feels like home with cleanliness and hygiene. The mess food is very tasty, and the canteen food is also fresh and yummy. We have a medical room. Coming to sports, we have volleyball, kho-kho, throwball, badminton, carrom, chess, table tennis, etc.

admission_overview.college_name: Sreenidhi University Courses Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: Sreenidhi University admission 2025 is open for all the courses. The university offers BTech courses in various specialisations at the UG level.Sreenidhi Universitycarried out the application in an online mode. Admission to BTech is entrance-based. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to fulfil the criteria set by the university. All the information related to Sreenidhi University admission, along with course eligibility and selection criteria, is available in the following segments:

Sreenidhi University admission to all its BTech courses is entrance-based. Candidates are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria for the respective course. The university offers admission to BTech based on SUCET, TG EAPCET and AP EAPCET exams. The table below listsSreenidhi University's courseeligibility selection criteria:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 10 and Class 12 in MPC with 60% aggregate from a recognised board
SUCET/TS EAMCET/AP EAMCET

Sreenidhi University admission processis open for all courses. The university offers entrance-based admission to BTech. Candidates must complete the admission process for admission. Check below theSreenidhi Universityadmission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process 2025
Candidates seeking admission to Sreenidhi University in any course are required to apply on the official website of the university.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Sreenidhi University admission is entrance-based. Additionally, Candidates need to fill out the eligibility criteria, i.e., pass Class 10 and Class 12 inPhysics, Chemistry andMathematicswith 60% aggregate.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee Submission
Candidates who get shortlisted in the selection round must pay the Sreenidhi University fee to lock in the final seats.

reviews.review_text: We have pretty good options in our course, where we have activities related to our course which make learning better and help graduates grow in their studies. The hostel also has premium security for both males and females, which makes it safe to study here from different locations.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Sreenidhi University has good infrastructure for courses and hostel. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library all are good at Sreenidhi University. There is good quality of facilities in the hostel and good quality of food available in the mess and canteen. Average medical facilities and good sports and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely fantastic curriculum and faculty.
reviews.review_text: I do not reside in the college hostel, but according to my classmates who are in the hostel, the food available there is not very good and there is a severe need for improvement. The rooms they provide are good, and the buildings are also nice.

reviews.review_heading: It is great and offers good placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. We have many facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and a library. Mainly, the computers are good and function smoothly, which is pretty great because most colleges don’t have much. The Wi-Fi is pretty fast, which gives us free browsing and helps with any exams.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2028.
reviews.review_text: Sreenidhi University offers smart classrooms equipped with advanced multimedia tools, enhancing the teaching and learning experiences. There are good laboratories across various departments like AI ML, CSE. There is a central library with a comprehensive collection of academic resources, which includes books, journals, etc.

reviews.review_heading: 4 years of enjoyful life and placements are heaven.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good and simple infrastructure. It has good facilities with sports, library, clubs, and special Wi-Fi. Our university is nice hostel with spacious rooms and has a ground to play. Hostel food is pretty good. We have clubs like arts club, NSS club, NCC club, coding club, inovaters loft, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sreenidhi University.
reviews.review_text: Our entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are equipped with audio-visual facilities, including projectors and digital boards. Classrooms can accommodate up to 80 members. Laboratories are especially good and can accommodate up to 100 people. All computers are in proper working conditions.

reviews.review_heading: Vibrant and supportive community that empower students.
reviews.review_text: The courses offer good infrastructure including Wi-Fi, computer labs, classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are comfortable. The mess and canteen provide satisfactory food. Medical facilities and playground are available for students' health and recreation.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good, good placements, and really good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The course which I took provides some good facilities and infrastructure like Wi-Fi, labs, library, and also you will have a sports class. The quality of food in the mess will be good. They also provide canteen with best snacks ever. They will also take care of you by giving rest in medical rooms, finally you will study while enjoying it too.

reviews.review_heading: Sreenidhi University is the best in my point of view.
reviews.review_text: There are lots of facilities in our college like Wi-Fi with good signal, labs are good, library has a lot of books to learn and is very calm. I am not a hosteller. I don't know about the hostel. But my friend said the hostel is good and they prepare good food.

faqs.answer: Yes, Hindu College of Engineering (HCE) is a known institute. HCE is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE). HCE offers full-time Diploma and B.Tech programs in five engineering disciplines: civil, computer science, electrical, mechanical, and biomedical. The Faculty members at HCE are highly experienced and knowledgeable and are experts in their respective fields of education and have completed their education from the reputed educational institutions across India. HCE has a 10-acre campus with classrooms, workshops, laboratories, conference and seminar halls, a cafeteria, and hostel accommodation. HCE is a good educational institution with a good campus placement and a clean and green environment. HCE emphasizes industry-readiness and has a relatively low cost of attendance.

review_summary.college_name: Hindu College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good management and faculty members.

content.Placements: In my course, nearly 35 to 40% of students get placed in this college. The lowest salary package offered is 2.4 LPA. The average salary package offered is 4.2 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. More than 50% of students got internships in companies like Shakaltech, Ancraft, and so on. Software engineer and web develops are some top roles offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: The speed of Wi-Fi is low. Classrooms are not so clean and the fans are also not all working. Sometimes librarian do not allow students to sit in the library. The food is average but there are no medical facilities in the hostel. There is not any perfect equipment for any sport.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My college is good in aspects that a student needs to build his career in a technical field.

content.Placements: Students who passed all the semesters with a minimum CGPA of 7 are almost placed. The highest package at our college is approximately 4 LPA. The lowest package at our college is 2.5 LPA. All private limited companies and industries visits our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides almost all the facilities that a student needs to build their career in a technical field. Facilities like Wi-Fi, libraries, and hostels are provided by the college itself. All the facilities are good in every way in comparison with the measures taken by the college for education.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Descent College in budget.

content.Placements: 60 Percent of Students were placed in course. The highest package is 8 Lacs per annum, the lowest package is around 3-4 Lacs per annum and average package is 5-6 per annum, 30% students get internship in Tesco Wipro. Students get internship on the basis of their knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available with best internet speed. Different labs are available like Compiler Design Lab, Matlab, Information Security and Data hiding Lab are available. Classroom infrastructure is good. Library infrastructure is also good. All books are available in library.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the facilities and the building is very old.

content.Placements: About 40 percent of students were placed, and about INR 500000 average packages were offered. Students did not get many jobs or placements in companies, and there were very few chances of getting a job from the college. If you want a job, you have to try your own way.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available and of good quality in the department, and labs were quite good, and computers in the lab were good enough. Classrooms were not good, and the paint on the walls is falling because the building is very old but can be repaired if someone tries to fix the issues.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Hindu College of Engineering.

content.Placements: Our college provides good placements. Top recruiting companies like Jio, Amazon, etc., visit our campus. The top role offered is SDE. Many students are placed.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen is good. You can find some of the best snacks at the canteen. A gym is available. Students can play any sport at another college, and the college pays for sports.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are good. Some teachers are boring, but the core subject teachers are good. Our HOD is excellent. Our teachers clarified our doubts. They are helpful. The teaching quality is good.

description: Hindu College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the BTech program. The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at Hindu College of Engineering can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

Hindu College of Engineering cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 532642 and 1451596 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 532642, B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 532642.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

During the last round, Hindu College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 532642 and 1451596 for students in the General HS quota. According to this cutoff list, B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering proved to be the toughest to get a seat for, with the cutoff rank being 532642 in 2025, while in 2024, the same specialisation had the cutoff rank of 1323804, and in 2023, it was 1323804.
