reviews.review_heading: Really good management and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The speed of Wi-Fi is low. Classrooms are not so clean and the fans are also not all working. Sometimes librarian do not allow students to sit in the library. The food is average but there are no medical facilities in the hostel. There is not any perfect equipment for any sport.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good in aspects that a student needs to build his career in a technical field.
reviews.review_text:
Our college provides almost all the facilities that a student needs to build their career in a technical field.
Facilities like Wi-Fi, libraries, and hostels are provided by the college itself.
All the facilities are good in every way in comparison with the measures taken by the college for education.

reviews.review_heading: Descent College in budget.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available with best internet speed. Different labs are available like Compiler Design Lab, Matlab, Information Security and Data hiding Lab are available. Classroom infrastructure is good. Library infrastructure is also good. All books are available in library.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the facilities and the building is very old.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available and of good quality in the department, and labs were quite good, and computers in the lab were good enough. Classrooms were not good, and the paint on the walls is falling because the building is very old but can be repaired if someone tries to fix the issues.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hindu College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is good. You can find some of the best snacks at the canteen. A gym is available. Students can play any sport at another college, and the college pays for sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent engineering college in Sonipat.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Wi-Fi speed is good. Our classrooms and library are excellent. Every classroom has a capacity of 100 seats. We can enjoy the campus. The campus is huge and beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hindu College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided many facilities. Wi-Fi was not available in classrooms, but it was available in labs and the library. The hostel food was very good and tasty. All students were very happy with the food. Sports were conducted at our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is good college for engineering in NCR Region.
reviews.review_text: All required facilities provide by the college like Wi-Fi, labs, Classrooms and library, etc. Every year sports meet is organised by the college in this sports meet many game tournament include like football, basketball, volleyball, badminton and cricket. In the hostel, every room contains two bad, two tables and two almirahs. The hostel has good quality food which is provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: They are good faculty in my college and have a good placement.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities in my college like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen, medical facilities, and other outdoor games. In my course are available facilities Wi-Fi for use of internet in computers. There are the best quality of facilities in my hostel. Canteen is for fresh food. Medical facilities for injured students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and good placement in every year.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi provided my college in every floor of college, labs and classrooms are also provided in college clean classrooms and provided bench, chairs and lecture stand, library are also provided and all books are in college library. Hostel facilities are provided, medical facilities, all types facilities are provided college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hindu College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is 15 acres in size. Our college has all the basic facilities that are required in a technical institution. All labs have air conditioning, and our classrooms are well structured too.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hindu College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our course are good. Our college provides free Wi-Fi for students. Classrooms, labs, and library are very good. Hostel mess is average but the food is very good. Badminton, cricket, and some games are available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are excellent. All sports facilities are available. The hostel and canteen facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college makes us perfect and thoughtful and ready for the industries.
reviews.review_text: The best snacks and food are provided by the hostel mess. Wi-Fi is available here. Sports facilities like badminton, table tennis, cricket equipment, a TV hall for cricket matches, water coolers, and clean toilets are available. Rooms are good and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: College treats as home and supports as friends.
reviews.review_text: College provides all facilities like Wi-Fi, practice labs, a cafeteria, etc. The college has a big library and the library staff helps students in finding the right books. College also provides reading space for students. Students can go to the reading room where they can study or read without any disturbance. Girls and boys have separate hostels as the college staff takes care of students properly. Sports-o-mania is arranged by the college for students where students can participate and compete...

individual_reviews.title: The college is nice but average placements, good infrastructure, but no fests.

content.Placements: 30% of students got placed. The salary package offered is 33.4 LPA/ 40% of students get internships. Computer Science and technology are preferable, and other branches are less preferable. CSE is more preferable, and I want students to join other branches also. Amazon, Wipro, and Infosys will hire.
content.Infrastructure: The college has Wi-Fi and labs. The classroom was nice, the hostel was also nice, but the food was average, and the quality was also average. The medical facility is also nice, sports and games are also nice, but need to be improved. NCC and NSS were excellent, but activities were fewer when compared to other colleges. Finally, the college was nice.

individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is one of the best colleges.

The college placements are very high this year compared to previous years. This year, even mechanical department students got many jobs.
content.Infrastructure: We have the best infrastructure in the Sasi Institute of Technology and Engineering. Classrooms, labs, and washrooms are regularly maintained. The hostel is cleaned every day. There is a complaint box available 24x7 in the hostel for ragging complaints without the victim's identity.

individual_reviews.title: It was the best college in Andhra Pradesh. The faculty helped us learn new skills.

paragraphs:
Sasi Institute of Technology and Engineering course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theSasi Institute of Technology and Engineeringapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG and After 10th programmes in fields of Engineering and Business and Management Studies, and more. To know about the eligibility of Sasi Institute of Technology and Engineering courses, students can visit the website.

Sasi Institute of Technology and Engineering fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Sasi Institute of Technology and Engineering fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on Sasi Institute of Technology and Engineering admission:

reviews.review_heading: The college is nice but average placements, good infrastructure, but no fests.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi and labs. The classroom was nice, the hostel was also nice, but the food was average, and the quality was also average. The medical facility is also nice, sports and games are also nice, but need to be improved. NCC and NSS were excellent, but activities were fewer when compared to other colleges. Finally, the college was nice.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: We have the best infrastructure in the Sasi Institute of Technology and Engineering. Classrooms, labs, and washrooms are regularly maintained. The hostel is cleaned every day. There is a complaint box available 24x7 in the hostel for ragging complaints without the victim's identity.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with supportive faculty and a disciplined academic environment.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, labs, and libraries are well-maintained. Hostel rooms are cleaned, and the mess food is average but maintainable. Wi-Fi is available in most areas of the campus. The hostel facilities are average. In evening and morning, the sports ground is available for students' use.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, faculty support, but average placements and limited industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are good, labs are well-equipped, classrooms are clean, and the library is useful. Hostel rooms are comfortable, food quality is decent, medical support is available, and sports and games are encouraged regularly. They provide credit for sports, also.

reviews.review_heading: It was the best college in Andhra Pradesh. The faculty helped us learn new skills.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are good, and labs are very clean, which helps us to learn new skills and gain knowledge. Coming to the library helps in studying. The mess and canteen were good. The medical facilities are helpful when a student is sick in our college. In sports and games, there are many events.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: This college provides Wi-Fi throughout the campus and in the hostel as well. The classrooms are very spacious. This college provides a library with all kinds of books. The canteen food is good. Not only in education, but also in sports and games. This college also provides medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure & satisfied study.
reviews.review_text: We have labs and also have access to college Wi-Fi. We also have both department and central libraries. The food quality is better, and the canteen is available for all 6 days, but not on Sunday. The mess is for hostlers, and sports are a regular activity and part of the study too. We also celebrate Sports Day very grandly. Coming to medical facilities, our college consists of 1 dispensary where students can get free medicine and minor treatment.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with decent placements and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good, actually. We have Wi-Fi across campus, which is great. About 70+ classrooms have projectors. Computer labs are well equipped, we have 30+ labs with the latest systems. The library is huge with tons of books and online resources too. Hostel rooms are decent, food quality is okay, not amazing, but edible. They serve special meals on weekends, like biryani, which is nice. The medical room is there 24/7 for emergencies. Sports facilities are awesome, cricket ground, fo...

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with good faculty members and basic facilities.
reviews.review_text: Well-maintained classroom with projectors and proper seating. Computer labs have sufficient systems and the required software for CSE students. Campus Wi-Fi is available for academic use. The library has good textbooks, reference books, and digital resources. Hostel rooms are clean with basic facilities and a regular water supply. Mess food quality is average with veg and non-veg options. Medical facilities and sports grounds are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for pursuing B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of our course and college are absolutely good and better. The libraries are good, the classrooms are clean and neat, and Wi-Fi is available. The hostel is not bad, the canteen is also not bad, but the prices, medical facilities are okay. Sports are good.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of SASI college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of our course and college are absolutely good. The libraries are good, the classrooms are clean and neat, and Wi-Fi is available. The hostel is not bad, the canteen is also not bad, but the prices, medical facilities are okay, and sports are good.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Tadepalligudem.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of our course and college are absolutely good and better. The libraries are good, the classrooms are clean and neat, and Wi-Fi is available. The hostel is not bad, the canteen is also not bad, but the prices, medical facilities are okay, and sports are good.

reviews.review_heading: Very happy for choosing this college.
reviews.review_text: High-tech amenities and the latest technology. The doctor in the college clinic is available during college hours. The food in the college mess is very tasty and healthy. All the rooms are maintained really well and cleaned regularly. There are computer labs for each branch separately. And we have high-end computers in the labs with high-speed internet access.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our course and college are absolutely good and better. Libraries are good. Classrooms are clean and neat. Wi-Fi is available. The hostel is not bad. The canteen is not bad, but prices are high. Medical facilities are okay. Sports are good.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good. Faculty members are available during college hours.
reviews.review_text: The library is very good. Classrooms and labs are excellent. The infrastructure is excellent. The quality of facilities in the hostel is good. Our wardens are very helpful to us, and if there is any issue, they respond immediately. The mess, canteen, and medical facilities are good.

Shivaji University offers undergraduate, postgraduate and PhD courses. Some of the most popular programmes include MBA and BTech.
The MBA programme is offered by the Management Department of the university, which provides top notch facilities to students to make them competent leaders. Additionally, the university offers an MBA programme in the ODL (open and distance learning) mode. Furthermore, SUK offers the AICTE-approved, Online MBA programme in the following electives:

Shivaji University offers various courses to candidates. These are offered in fields such as Arts, Commerce, Science, etc.

Shivaji University courses include BTech, BEd, BSc and other courses at the UG level. For PG students, Shivaji University provides courses such as MA, MTech, MBA, MCom, MPharma, and MEd, among others. faqs.answer: A:    Shivaji University cutoff 2024 to BTech courses is based on MHTCET scores. As per Shivaji University MHTCET cutoff 2024, the CSE rank stood between 6.89 and 50.6 for the General AI category candidates, under which, Nanasaheb Mahadik College of Engineering has the highest cutoff percentile for General category All India candidates. Candidates can check out the cutoffs for various BTech courses from the official Shivaji University Page:
faqs.question: What is the cutoff of Shivaji University?

faqs.answer: A:    The entrance exams are accepted by Shivaji University for BTech course include JEE Main/ MHT CET. Moreover, for BArch course include MHT JEE Main (Paper 2)/ MHT CET. Further, for MBA courses, the entrance exams accepted include CAT/ CMAT/ ATMA/ MAT/ MAT/6 CET. The entrance exams accepted for M.Tech course at Shivaji University include GATE/ MHT CET. For PhD course, the entrance exams accepted include the UGC NET/ GATE/ GPAT/ Shivaji University entrance test.
faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted by Shivaji University?

faqs.answer: A:    Shivaji University seats are limited. Students are given a seat through entrance + counselling basis. The intake depends on programme and specialisation. The intake for the programmes is as below:CoursesSeat IntakeBTech360MSc230MCA60MBA60BEd50
faqs.question: What is the seat availability at Shivaji University?

faqs.answer: A:    The Shivaji University NEET PG Cutoff 2025 was released till Round 2 for all categories under the All India quota. For the General AI category, the cutoff ranged from 5391 to 93592 for admission to the Rajiv Gandhi Medical College, Thane, wherein MD in Obstetrics and Gynaecology and MS in ENT were the top two most sought-after courses for this category, with the closing ranks of 5391 and 12659, respectively. Note: This is the round 2 closing cutoff for the General AI category in the aforementioned college, other categories, quotas, rounds, and colleges will have different cutoffs accordingly.

individual_reviews.title: The college is best and the faculty is also good.

content.Placements: 60 to 70 percent of students got placed from my college. 4.5 LPA is the highest and 1.5 LPA is the lowest average package in my college. Bharat Forget, Tata Motors, Bajaj Auto, hohn deere, Land Core, and Capgemini are recruiting companies. 60 to 70 percent of students got internships from my course in college, such as Software developer, trainee engineer, and junior programmer.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good, there is Wi-Fi in all departments, all types of labs, and classrooms. The library is also very good, follow discipline and quickness. The quality of faculty is good in my hostel, the quality of food is average. The canteen is very clean and hygienic, and the medical area is also hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My college is the best in my living area, and the faculty is also very good.

content.Placements: 70 to 80 percent of students were placed in my college. 4 Lacs was the highest and 1 to 1.5 Lacs is the lowest and 2.5 Lacs is average package offered in my college Wipro, bajaj, mahindra, tcs, ibm, lti, cognizant, accenture inphosys 60 to 80 percent of students were placed got internship from my course and in inphosys, bajaj, wipro companies Software develops, trainee engineer, it support execute, contractor.
content.Infrastructure: The schedule is moderate, with around 5 to 15 lectures per week. The facilities are very good. Teaching was also very good, and the facilities include Wi-Fi in the departments. The average quality of the facilities in our hostel is acceptable, and the quality of food is good, available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are also good in our college, and sports and games are well supported; there are separate periods for games and sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Short review of WCE Sangli.

content.Placements: I am pursuing a B Tech degree in Artificial Intelligence and Machine learning from Walchand College. My college has nearly 80 to 85 percent of students placed in top companies from the CSE branch. From 2023, the college intake is increased for the CSE & IT branch and two new branches, AIML & Robotics Automation. Last year, the highest package is near 1.5 crores. Top Tech companies visited the campus, like Rubrics etc.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in the college like Wi-Fi but the infrastructure is old. West Maharashtras largest library is in a college. The hostel facility is not available for all students. Semester exams are very strict; in every classroom, 2 to 3 cameras are set up. Mid sem exam continuing 30 marks, internal exams continuing 20 marks, and end sem exam continuing 50 marks. For passing, an overall 40 marks out of 100 are necessary, and in the end sem 20 are necessary.

admission_overview.college_name: Shivaji University Kolhapur Course Admissions 2026: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_overview.title: Shivaji University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Shivaji University admissions are offered on both merit and entrance basis. Students seeking admissions have to meet the basic eligibility and clear the selection rounds to get admission. The university offers 126 undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and doctoral courses through various departments. These are Science, Arts, Technology, Management, and Commerce fields. The Shivaji University accepts the scores of national, state, and university-level entrance exams for technical courses, such as BTech, MCA, and MBA. For non-professional courses, including BA, BSc, MSW, MA, etc., Shivaji University admission is based on its in-house entrance test. The university also offers distance education courses approved by UGC. Interested students can go through the following sections to know about the eligibility and admission process for Shivaji University.

eligibility_selection.title: Shivaji University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Shivaji University course admissions are offered to candidates who meet the preset admission requirements. The university primariy offers entrance-based admissions. Students can submit scores of national-level entrance tests including JEE Main, GATE, UGC NET, GPAT, etc. The university also considers the MHT CET for admissions to BTech courses. The common eligibility for Shivaji University programmes is as below: Interested students can check the table below to know the eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popular :

The common eligibility is as below:Shivaji University UG eligibility – Class 12 with relevant subjects from a recognised boardShivaji University PG eligibility – UG degree in relevant field from a recognised universityShivaji University PhD eligibility – PG degree from a recognised university
faqs.question: Who is eligible for Shivaji University admission?

faqs.answer: Students may get admission in Shivaji University with 70% in Class 12. The minimum percentage required in Class 12 is generally 45%. So,  70% does make you eligible to apply. The final selection however, is subject to clearing the selection rounds.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in Shivaji University with 70% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: The Shivaji University MBA admission process begins with the submission of an application.  Apply for the preferred course by visiting the official website of the university. The application form enquires about basic academic and personal details. The steps are as follows- 1. Go to the verified website of the university.2. Find the 'tab of admission in the menu and touch on the PG-Admission.3. Click on the 'PG Admission Registration-26 application'.4. Register as a new candidate.5. Fill out the application & upload imp. documents.6. Pay the application fee and submit the form.
faqs.question: How do I apply for MBA admissions at Shivaji University?

faqs.answer: The Shivaji University NEET PG Cutoff 2025 was released till Round 2 for all categories under the All India quota. For the General AI category, the cutoff ranged from 5391 to 93592 for admission to the Rajiv Gandhi Medical College, Thane, wherein MD in Obstetrics and Gynaecology and MS in ENT were the top two most sought-after courses for this category, with the closing ranks of 5391 and 12659, respectively. Note: This is the round 2 closing cutoff for the General AI category in the aforementioned college, other categories, quotas, rounds, and colleges will have different cutoffs accordingly.
faqs.question: What is the Shivaji University NEET PG Cutoff 2025?

paragraphs: Shivaji University admissions are held online on its official site. Students can apply after checking the eligibility. The process include application, selection, and admission confirmation. Students can follow the steps below to complete theShivaji University admission process:
Application Process 2026

Shivaji University admission starts with the release of the application form. Candidates can complete the application form online. The form has to be turned in with documents and application fees amount before the last date.
Selection Process 2026

Candidates are shortlisted depending on the shorlisting criteria. For professional courses, like MBA, BTech, B.Ed, MCA, etc., the university accepts national-level entrance exams, like JEE Main, GATE, UGC NET, GPAT, MH CET, etc. For non-technical courses, like BA, BSc, MSW, MA, etc., the university conducts its own entrance test.
Admission Confirmation

Shivaji University releases the merit list based on the cutoff scores in the accepted exams for finalising candidates. Selected students have to report for verification of documents and pay theShivaji University admission feesto complete the process.

TheShivaji University fee structureincludes different components. Some of these include tuition fees, library fees, caution deposit, and more. Students have to pay the amount through accepted payment gateway. The fees changes based on course and specialisation. Students can check the table below to know about theShivaji University feesfor popular programmes:
*This information is as per the official website and is subject to change.

Shivaji University offers seats for a few in-campus courses by the affiliated colleges/campuses. To secure a seat in Shivaji University and its affiliated colleges/campus candidates must complete the admission process. Refer to the table below for more details:

courses_data.description: Shivaji University offers BTech course that runs for four years, further divided into eight semesters. This course is spread across six specialisations, including Chemical Engineering, Food Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering, and more. Admission to BTech atShivaji Universityis entrance exam-based. The mode of application for BTech is online. Read on to know more about the Shivaji University BTech course.

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for admission to the BTech programme at Shivaji University?
faqs.answer: For admission to the BTech programme at Shivaji University Candidates must have passed class 12 or equivalent examinations with Physics, Mathematics, and Chemistry/Biology/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational subject with at least 50% marks (45% for reserved categories) in the aggregate,  also candidates must have appeared for any one of the entrance exams such as JEE Main/ MHT CET/ Uni GAUGE-E to be eligible for admission.

faqs.question: What is the fees of BTech course in Shivaji University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BTech at Shivaji University ranges fromINR 51,400 - INR 4.9 lakhdepending on the specialisation the candidate is going for, as the BTech fee for candidates coming through lateral entry is different from the regular four-year BTech programme. At the time of admission, other components of the fee might be added to the tuition fee. Candidates are required to pay the registration fee ofINR 100for BTech course.

faqs.question: Is there BTech at Shivaji University Kolhapur?
faqs.answer: Yes, Shivaji University offers a BTech programme under six specialisations namely Chemical Engineering, Food Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering and Food Technology. It also provides lateral entry to students who have either completed a Diploma in engineering.

faqs.question: Can I get into Shivaji University with 70% in class 12th?
faqs.answer: As per the admission 2025 for the Shivaji University, there is no 12th percentage needed to get into Shivaji University. courses_data.description: Shivaji University offers a regular BSc at undergraduate level for three years. BSc is offered in a full-time mode under six specialisations on the main campus of Shivaji University. Besides this, the university offers several specialisations through its affiliated colleges. Students seeking admission can apply for the course by submitting an application form online. Admission to BSc is entrance exam-based.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Shivaji University BSc?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have twelve years of school education with 40% to 50% aggregate are eligible for the Shivaji University BSc programme. Candidates seeking admission to BSc at Shivaji University can apply for the course by submitting an application form online. Admission to BSc is entrance exam-based.

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted by Shivaji University?
faqs.answer: The entrance exams are accepted by Shivaji University for BTech course includeJEE Main/MHT CET. Moreover, for BArch course includeMHTJEE Main (Paper 2)/MHT CET. Further, for MBA courses, the entrance exams accepted includeCAT/CMAT/ATMA/MAT/MAT/6 CET. The entrance exams accepted for M.Tech course at Shivaji University includeGATE/MHT CET. For PhD course, the entrance exams accepted include theUGC NET/GATE/GPAT/ Shivaji University entrance test.

faqs.question: What is the duration and mode of the BSc course at Shivaji University?
faqs.answer: Shivaji University provides BSc with a duration of three years for undergraduate programmes. The programme is organized in full-time regular mode on the main campus. Candidates are also provided with BSc specialisations through the affiliated colleges of the university. Shivaji University provides quality education in various streams under the BSc course.

faqs.question: How can I get BSc admission to Shivaji University Kolhapur 2025?
faqs.answer: To get admission in Shivaji University Kolhapur, candidates must qualify the eligibility criteria and appear for the University's entrance exam. The table below lists all kind of BSc programme offered at Shivaji University along with the eligibility criteria:ProgrammeEligibilityNano Science TechnologyCandidates must have 45% marks in the Class 12 Science exam (open category) or 40% marks (reserved categories) and pass the school's entrance exam to be eligible for admission to the School of Nanoscience and Technology at Shivaji University in Kolhapur.BSc - MSc integrated Nano Science Technology (5 years)Candidates must have 45% marks in the Class 12 Science exam (open category) or 40% marks (reserved categories) and pass the school's entrance exam to be eligible for admission to the School of Nanoscience and Technology at Shivaji University in Kolhapur.

faqs.question: How is Shivaji College and can I get admission into it with 95%?
faqs.answer: Shivaji University, located in Kolhapur, was established in1962. The university is accredited withGrade Aby theNAAC. The university affiliates276 collegesthat are spread over three districts of Maharashtra, namely, Kolhapur, Sangli, and Satara. Shivaji Uiversity has better infrstruture than most of DU's colleges. As for the placements, the university offers a decent placements package for its professonal cousres. In 2023, a total of1291 students enrolledand25 studentswereplacedduring Shivaji University placements 2023.Yes, you can get into Shivaji College with 95% in class 12th. The admission to UG courses is done on the basis of marks scored in class 12th. For example, for the BTech programme, the eligibility is 45-50 % in class 12 in the relevant stream. Therefore, with 95% in class 12th, you are eligible for admission to Shivaji College. The admission process for Shivaji College is completely online. For undergraduate courses, admission is based on the marks scored in class 12t. The

faqs.question: What is the fees for Shivaji University admission?
faqs.answer: Shivaji fees is different depending on the programme and specialisation. Students can pay the fees through accepted payment gateway. The payment has to be done timely. The course fees is as below:CoursesTuition FeesBTechINR 51,400 - INR 5.5 lakhBDesINR 1.3 Lacs - INR 1.7 lakhMScINR 2,000 - INR 92,500BScINR 5,800 - INR 47,400MCAINR 42,000 - INR 2.2 lakhMBAINR 50,700 - INR 2.4 lakhNote: This is taken from official sources and can change.

faqs.question: What is the criteria to take admission in Shivaji University for Integrated B.Sc + M.Sc in Nanoscience and Technology?
faqs.answer:
Basic eligibility to secure admission for Integrated B.Sc + M.Sc in Nanoscience and Technology in Shivaji University is that candidate should have a minimum pass mark of 45% in class 12. Candidate must have passed 10+2 in Science stream.
Final year appearing candidates can also apply on provisional basis.
Those Candidates who belongs to other state will have to score minimum 55% marks in 10+2.
Final Selection
Candidates are selected based on Shivaji University entrance exam score and marks obtained in 10+2.
Selection parameters and weightage : 
Entrance Exam Score- 50%
10+2 exam score - 50%
Regards.

placement_report.college_name: Shivaji University Kolhapur Placements 2025: Average Package, Median Package, Students Placed

placement_data.title: Shivaji University Kolhapur Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to NIRF report 2025, a total of 190 students were placed and 12 students were selected for higher studies out of total 239 students during Shivaji University UG 4-year placements 2024 . The median package received by UG 4-year students in 2024 was 3.3 LPA .

The median package recorded during Shivaji University placement 2024 for PG 2-year course was 2.4 LPA . In addition, 672 students were placed and 135 students were selected for higher studies out of 1193 graduating students in 2024.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is Shivaji University. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #45 under State Public University category. Shivaji University excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around Shivaji University rankings is covered in the following article:

nirf.description:
Shivaji University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Shivaji University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'State Public University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Shivaji University climbed 6 ranks to #45 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the Shivaji University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:
Read less

qs_world.description:
Shivaji University has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2026, Shivaji University fell 180 ranks to #801 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Shivaji University fell 67 ranks to #254 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sant Gajanan Maharaj Education Group, MahagaonReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is best and the faculty is also good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good, there is Wi-Fi in all departments, all types of labs, and classrooms. The library is also very good, follow discipline and quickness. The quality of faculty is good in my hostel, the quality of food is average. The canteen is very clean and hygienic, and the medical area is also hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sant Gajanan Maharaj College of EngineeringReviewed on 4 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: All infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: In college, Wi-Fi is available everywhere for all students, and classrooms are cleaned every day with machines.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Shri Shahaji Chhatrapati MahavidyalayaReviewed on 27 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Affordable fees, supportive staff, but average campus life.
reviews.review_text: I think facilities in my college were good. Clean water was available. Classroom and seperate library were available. There was no Wi-Fi. Quality of college canteen was good, and cheap food was available. Sports like kabbadi, kho-kho, and cricket were available. Medical facilities were very poor.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sant Gajanan Maharaj Education Group, MahagaonReviewed on 4 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college is the best in my living area, and the faculty is also very good.
reviews.review_text: The schedule is moderate, with around 5 to 15 lectures per week. The facilities are very good. Teaching was also very good, and the facilities include Wi-Fi in the departments. The average quality of the facilities in our hostel is acceptable, and the quality of food is good, available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are also good in our college, and sports and games are well supported; there are separate periods for games and sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Walchand College of EngineeringReviewed on 30 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Short review of WCE Sangli.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in the college like Wi-Fi but the infrastructure is old. West Maharashtras largest library is in a college. The hostel facility is not available for all students. Semester exams are very strict; in every classroom, 2 to 3 cameras are set up. Mid sem exam continuing 30 marks, internal exams continuing 20 marks, and end sem exam continuing 50 marks. For passing, an overall 40 marks out of 100 are necessary, and in the end sem 20 are necessary.

reviews.review_heading: Not much recommended due to poor placements.
reviews.review_text: Average with quite natural diversity and good weather conditions as it is located outside Kolhapur city. You can enjoy Kolhapur city and its attractions more often. The college has good food culture and great festivals. Historically, the site is located near the city, which is an overall good city.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Walchand College of EngineeringReviewed on 28 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Huge green campus, helpful seniors, no ragging, clubs, competition, and respectful students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24X7 in library, classrooms, hostels, study room, and on campus too. Labs are conducted in their respective departments. College has very big campus with separate departments and an academic complex for classes and theory lectures. In hostel, we have 4 sharing rooms and 2 shared rooms for NRI. There are playground, jogging track, a mess, and gym as well.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good, and if you want this college for law, this college is very best for law.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of hostel is very good, and there are so many things and Wi-Fi all over hostel and college. We don't have lab; we have a moot court hall for the practice of hearing and judgment. All facilities in the hostel and mess are very good and food is like 5 star. Overall, all is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering & TechnologyReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best college for mechanical engineering in Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: The college mess and hostels are very good. Food in the college mess is good and hygienic. The college environment is also good. The campus is silent. College provides various facilities like Wi-Fi, good classrooms, and a well-structured library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering & TechnologyReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college in Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good. The college has a big and very clean campus. There are lots of trees present in the college campus thats why the college environment is very good and green. The college provides all facilities such as Wi-Fi, bus, canteen, etc. The college has a big ground for sports activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by KIT College of Engineering, KolhapurReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is really a good college for engineering and MBA. Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In my department, there are fully ventilated classrooms. In all classrooms, there are digital screens from BenQ systems. All classrooms have different Wi-Fi connections. There are fully equipped 6 computer labs with computer systems. There are three different canteens that are well-facilitated. In my hostel, the rooms are clean and clear. A separate study room is available. There is a ground where you can play cricket, volleyball, football, kabaddi, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Vasantidevi Patil Institute of Pharmacy, KodoliReviewed on 17 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college of pharmacy in Kolhapur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The college has a very good and large campus, and the college's buildings are also good. The college provides all facilities to the students, like Wi-Fi, drinking water, a good library, and classrooms that are also good. The college mess is good, and they will provide good food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Government Medical College, MirajReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good institution, good teaching faculty, cultural event, has good facilities and a green campus.
reviews.review_text: Most of our college infrastructure is old, continuing from 1987 (established year), but renovations are going on in many departments. The hospital has many facilities that are required. About hostels, the actual condition is very bad, 4 people in a room, and buildings are very old, leakage and bathroom blockage occur on multiple floors. These need renovation. We have a central library that's new and a very study-focused place. Mess food is also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by D Y Patil College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: D Y Patil College is very good for those who want placement.
reviews.review_text: Every department has a special building, and there is a garden with some space for students. There are too many labs for every department, and our library is in a different building. Most students live in the hostel, which has a building and a mess. There is no ground for our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sant Gajanan Maharaj College of EngineeringReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is so nice, you come here on a visit and see all over campus and the whole college.
reviews.review_text: Our department has decent classrooms, labs, campus Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostel rooms are clean everyday with lots of workers. Mess food is average but hygienic, medical aid is available, and teachers help in my studies, and they provide all notes, etc.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Babu Banarasi Das Northern India Institute of Technology (BBDNIIT) admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects

Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities

Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Babu Banarasi Das Northern India Institute of Technology (BBDNIIT) offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma and B.Ed. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Babu Banarasi Das Northern India Institute of Technology (BBDNIIT) offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Pharma. The fees for Babu Banarasi Das Northern India Institute of Technology (BBDNIIT) courses range between INR 1,00,200 to 3,25,009.

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Babu Banarasi Das Northern India Institute of Technology (BBDNIIT) is up to 875. Good thing to know is that Babu Banarasi Das Northern India Institute of Technology (BBDNIIT) has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews_list.review_title: For the study, you want to come.

review_content.Placements: The package is average at BBD NIIT, around 4 to 5 LPA. The expected salary is good for those seeking opportunities. Many other colleges don’t provide this type of placement. If you need average placement, you can visit this college, but the placement is not very high.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college facilities are the best. Lab, class, and everything else are great. The canteen and sports facilities are also good. Every day you have a new menu, and college life offers a great experience. The food in the canteen is also good, and the library provides a great time experience for games and food.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: This college is good for teaching and enjoying college life, but it is average for placement.

review_content.Placements: This is a good college for everything. College is average for placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college hostel is nice and enjoyable. This college has two types of boys' hostels, first A and B boys' hostel, and second C and D boys' hostel, but this college has many girls' hostels and facilities for only girls. This college's boys' hostel food is average.

Sports and games tournaments are held We have two big canteens and a Nescafe stall. There are many other facilities provided by college security guards.

reviews.review_heading: BBDNIIT Lucknow: A leading institute with modern infrastructure and quality education.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure. It contains a stadium and 2 canteens. There are well-maintained auditoriums in BBDNIIT, Lucknow. A leading institute with modern infrastructure, quality education, and strong placements.

reviews.review_heading: Short review on Babu Banarasi Das University.
reviews.review_text: If I talk about the infrastructure then I would rate it 9/10 as infrastructure is good and hygiene is maintained. Classrooms are bigger and students do not feel crowded. There is a library which has a lot of books. Labs are provided with an internet connection and are well-maintained. Hostel is secured by guards and is cleaned regularly. Hostel food is just similar to every other hostel (we all know). Medical facilities are provided and a medical van is there for emergency purposes.

reviews.review_heading: One should definitely consider this college for admission.
reviews.review_text: College provides good Wi-Fi and efficient labs. Library not only has books but also has a printer. Hostel provides clean food, and its maintenance is excellent. Canteen has good and fulfilling options for both day scholars and hostelers. College also has medical centers.

reviews.review_heading: BBD NIIT is a very good college if you are coming here to learn and develop skills.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on each floor. Various labs are there to perform practicals. Classrooms have a focused environment. The library helps a lot for the students. All facilities and good, healthy food are available at affordable prices. A hospital is available on the campus. There are 2 canteens. A stadium is available for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with everything including learning, placement, good infrastructure and facilities .
reviews.review_text:
Our college have good facilities and infrastructure with good environment of study like Wi-Fi, labs with AC, and a library with many books. 
The hostel facility is also good with everything, including fests and events. 
Foods are also good and rooms are well organized .

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, good placement in 2022, infrastructure is good, facilities is below average.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in this college are average. The Wi-Fi is not provided by the college. Yes, there are labs, classrooms, and a library, but they are not air-conditioned. The hostel rooms are small, and the B.Ed. provided by the college is not in good condition. The quality of breakfast and evening snacks is good in the mess, but I don't like the lunch or dinner. The canteen food is always good, the medical facilities are good, and sports and games have a 4-star rating out of 10.

description: SVCE - Sri Venkateshwara College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

SVCE - Sri Venkateshwara College of Engineering Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 29860 in the General AI category.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at SVCE - Sri Venkateshwara College of Engineering. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 29860 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 22854, while in 2023, it was 17462.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

SVCE - Sri Venkateshwara College of Engineering accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 51205 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 64036, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the SVCE - Sri Venkateshwara College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering stood at 35910 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.
Students can use the filters provided below to view the cutoff for other categories and quotas for 2025, 2024 and 2023.

hostel_campus.college_name: SVCE - Sri Venkateshwara College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good, best faculty, infrastructure is so pleasant, cool. Good for club activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hospitality of SVCE are quite good, so every student can be satisfied with the facilities provided by the management. The activities are managed by the SAC team, which controls all curriculum activities. Everyone can feel safe and secure by joining SVCE.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our labs are arranged with good infrastructure. Classrooms are good. We have a library with a nice environment. Classrooms are nice in our college. In our college, hostel facilities are good. The food available is good.

reviews.review_heading: The college life at SVCE.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members are wonderful. They explain the concept, but the Wi-Fi is also available. We have to pay a thousand rupees for it. The classrooms are also neat and clean. We have a huge library with huge facilities, and the quality of the food in the hostel is okay, but not that much. Only veg is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best and decent college of Bengaluru.
reviews.review_text: Very good and clean infrastructure. Research and development labs with encouraging faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SVCE - Sri Venkateshwara College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The mechanical course that I selected is purely based on my interest and the college specializes in the mechanical department and provides labs equal to IIT and GCT. The hostel is good and provides good vegetarian food only but don't misbehave and try to take advantage of the hostel wardens. RTS is very hill and the Wi-Fi connection in the hostel is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Good for enjoying and getting jobs. It provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are better. Hostel facilities are good for girls, but the hostel fee is too high. Hostels provide more security than PG hostels. The food is good on some days. The college conducts various sports events and provides various club activities. The canteen offers good food.

reviews.review_heading: College review according to students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and it has beautiful nature. Wi-Fi is not available in our college, but classrooms and library are quite good. The quality of facilities in our hostel is very clean, and the quality of food is also fine.

reviews.review_heading: College is best if you get an EAMCET seat.
reviews.review_text: We don't have Wi-Fi for any personal use. The food quality is good for what you pay. College environment is good and clean. If you are looking to join this college you can completely go regarding infrastructure and the college.

reviews.review_heading: There is no campus, and teachers are below average.
reviews.review_text: The cafeteria is really small, but it's quite good, not too bad. The canteen is big, but the maintenance is horrible; all the tables are dirty, and you have to search for a clean table, which is very rare to find. The food and snacks are pretty good, but the hostel food is really bad, which is why students shift to PGs.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not satisfied because of our college, but I don't know about placement. Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is good. Labs are neither too big nor too small, they are good. Computer labs are well-equipped and also Wi-Fi around the campus is not that good, it often doesn't work. Campus is clean. I don't know much about hostel. But as far as what I have heard from my friends they said hostel has good Wi-Fi. Food is not provided they have to buy from outside. Infrastructure of hostel is also good.

reviews.review_heading: We are not satisfied with the teaching of some teachers.
reviews.review_text: We are not getting proper food in hostels. We need to get permission even to go out for one day. The food cost is high in hostels. The hostel fee is around Rs. 6,000-7,000 per month. There are network issues in particular places.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with teaching but the fests and festivals are often conducted.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and library are good. Wi-Fi is fully available in our college. Library is good and all books and materials are available. There is no hostel food. College has a huge campus where we can still study. Van facilities are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, placements are good and good internship training are also provided.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the classroom is good; the Wi-Fi facilities are there.
They provide separate library classes and also provide lab classes.
The hostel facility is also good. The neatness is also good, and the food is also good in a mess.
There is a canteen and the items are good.

reviews.review_heading: I think college is good enough to join if you want average jobs.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is small but has good infrastructure and cleanliness. The Wi-Fi speed on campus is also good. The labs are well-equipped, and the library is nice, though it’s not completely silent. The hostel is very clean and well-maintained, but the food is average. The hostel is strict and doesn't allow outsiders to visit, except for parents. If they find out that you brought someone from outside, they fine you as punishment.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Venkateshwara College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: In respective departments, Wi-Fi is accessible to every student. Labs and classrooms are fully equipped. Library has a wide range of course-related books. In college hostels, rooms for six are available, and quality of food in the mess and canteen is good. College is fully provided with medical facilities. College also gives priority to sports and games.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about SVCE - Sri Venkateshwara College of Engineering

likes.text: We have recruitment from top companies like Wipro, TCS, Amazon, and many other companies that visit our college.
The placements are good, especially for computer science and engineering department and information science department students.

likes.text: The college provides very good facilities like Wi-Fi, good classrooms, a library and our department has a separate research centre.
Canteen is maintained hygienic, and quality of food is worth to the money we pay, and the only facility I wish our college should develop is in sports.

likes.text: The teachers are outstanding related to the course, and they are qualified enough to educate us.
The college organises workshops, seminars, talks from the industrial people to make students ready to face the industrial world.

likes.text: I wish the college should improve our technical skills in electronic and computer languages.
Every year, events are conducted like technical and culture fests, workshops, sports, etc.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and After 10th levels, Netaji Subhas Institute of Technology offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA courses at the UG level. While, at the After 10th level, the college offers available programmes like After 10th Diploma. The Netaji Subhas Institute of Technology course fee ranges between INR 2,09,500 to 5,12,500.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college placements and faculty for our course.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 30-40% of the students get on-campus placements at this college. The average package offered at the college was between 3-5 LPA. Our college provides proper placements and internship training to the students. Various students get summer internship opportunities at our college. Overall, our college offers good placements and internship opportunities to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available at NSIT for our course were good enough. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, sports, etc., facilities were given to the students. Multiple sports facilities were available for the students' entertainment purposes. Food available at the mess and canteen was good to eat.

review_content.Placements: Many students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 21 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Around 120 students got placed in our course. Many students got placed in CSE and B.Tech branches.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, etc. The food served in the mess is good. They provide medical, sports, and games facilities.

individual_reviews.title: In short, I can tell that if you have few money, you can take admission in these colleges.

content.Placements: The placement record of college is not good because of their location and the worst infrastructure. If students get placement, it might be only minimum 2 to 3 LPA, and maximum 3 to 4 LPA is very rare. They don't have any company that gives placement offers to Computer Science branch.
content.Infrastructure: College environment is good and campus has a big ground, but they need very much improvement in class because classes are in the worst position, and in some classes we don't have fan. They don't have canteen also, and the management is very strict.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Netaji Subhas Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: At least 60 percent is the minimum mark required for placement. The highest package offered is about one crore, the lowest package offered is 5 lacs, and the average package offered is about 10 to 20 lacs. There are many companies available, and of course there are very good placements.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available for my course are very good. It is described that our college facilities are very good; there are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries. There are also very good hostel facilities. Food and mess facilities are good, and many sports and games are available.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Netaji Subhas Institute of Technology is the best college, which you must visit once.

content.Placements: In my batch, 75 percent of students will be placed in my course in my semester years. The highest package is INR 8 lacs per annum, and the average is INR 5 lacs per annum. Top recruiting companies are Bajaj Motors, Tata Motors, and AVG Wires. 90 percent of students will go for an internship, which is compulsory. The top role offered in my course is junior engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure at my college. Free Wi-Fi in the whole campus area, good modern technology, and fully air-conditioned labs make this the No. 1 lab in Bihar colleges. The quality of the mess and canteen food is awesome. I always remember my hostel days, which had pure, neat, and clean messes.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Netaji Subhas Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available for my course are very good. It is described that our college facilities are very good; there are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries. There are also very good hostel facilities. Food and mess facilities are good, and many sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college placements and faculty for our course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available at NSIT for our course were good enough. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, hostel, sports, etc., facilities were given to the students. Multiple sports facilities were available for the students' entertainment purposes. Food available at the mess and canteen was good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, etc. The food served in the mess is good. They provide medical, sports, and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Netaji Subhas Institute of Technology is the best college, which you must visit once.
reviews.review_text:
Good infrastructure at my college. Free Wi-Fi in the whole campus area, good modern technology, and fully air-conditioned labs make this the No. 1 lab in Bihar colleges.
The quality of the mess and canteen food is awesome. I always remember my hostel days, which had pure, neat, and clean messes.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The lab is not good as it should be, you will only get theoretical knowledge here. The campus is not wi-fi enabled campus, the classroom is good and if I talk about the library, it is good but not good for me because when I was pursuing my course , the syllabus got changed.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students in Bihar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good and big. All labs and classrooms are good. The campus is good for freshers. New students get good advice from their seniors and are helpful to juniors. Everything works well in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Netaji Subhas Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Smart classrooms are well-equipped with whiteboards and several fans. Wi-Fi is available for hostel students only. The library is quite good, but they offer only basic books, not advanced ones. The lab is average. The food is available for hostel students only. The food served in the hostel is average. There is a new campus for medical facilities, which is quite good, but the charges are high. Sports and games are for hostel students, not for regular students.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the college in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is somewhat good. Maybe that's the only thing by which students get admitted to this college. There is nothing to be good except the cricket ground. It is also getting poor due to a lack of maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good private college in Bihar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good here. Every facility is available. But there are many restrictions in this college like you can't use Wi-Fi during college hours. You can't roam around the canteen during college hours. You cant bunk the class. Otherwise, you will be heavily fined.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good for diploma, but if you want B.Tech, it is better to opt for a government college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available for non-boarding students. Free Wi-Fi is only limited to up to 25 MB per day. There are no medical facilities on campus. Canteen is below average and has got even worse. Sports and games are not focused and the college only conducts one major event every year.

reviews.review_heading: If you take admission into this college, then you have to do self-study.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides facilities like transport, library, computing resource, hostel, canteen, classrooms, labs, etc. Facilities and infrastructure are good. It has a huge infrastructure of approximately 4 lacs sq ft of built-up area on approximately 11 acres of land at Amhara, Bihta Patna.

reviews.review_heading: I am partially dissatisfied because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: For our civil engineering course, almost all labs are available like a levelling lab, material testing lab, soil testing lab, ranging lab, water resource lab and design and drawing lab. Almost all classrooms are Wi-Fi enabled, and there is also a huge library in our college. Students can find and get any book whatever they are interested in.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty members and placements of our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and the departments are also good. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are good. The library is well maintained and has a centralised air-conditioning facility. Wi-Fi facility is available only for hostel students and faculty members and not for day scholars. The hostel is very bad and is not according to the fee charged. The food served here is very bad. Hostel staff members are very unhygienic, and their service is the worst.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for B.Tech course.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food served in the college canteen is tasty. Medical facilities are available at the time of emergency in the college. Proper care of student is done in case of any injury. Sports and games facility is available on a regular basis to all the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good and excellent work .

review_content.Placements: 100% of students are placed in this course. The package starts from 15,000 to 80,000 per month, and the Apollo Hospital itself gives the opportunity for placements. 100% get internships here, and physical therapist roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: They have furnished hostels for staying, and labs are offered for the practice of skills. And a library for studying and computers for projects. In the hostel, they have nice food and cleaning, and they provide outing facilities to go when we need security.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It has good infrastructure, well-qualified faculty and decent placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 75 percent of students in our course get placed during the placement season. The placement cell is active and supportive in preparing students through mock interviews and aptitude sessions. The top roles offered are software developer, system engineer analyst and technical support executive.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department has well-maintained classrooms with smart boards. The computer labs are up to date and well equipped for programming and networking practicals. The central library has a good collection of books and journals relevant to our syllabus.

review_summary.college_name: The Apollo University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Basically, it's a very big university, but it takes a few years to build more infrastructure.

content.Placements: Hi, I'm Vignesh from The Apollo University. There are a few students who got placed for a job with a good package. By a few, I mean like 5 to 10 students got placed, only one got a package of 18 LPA as a fresher, and the normal average package is 7 LPA. There are placements still yet to be announced on the campus, we are waiting.
content.Infrastructure: There are two campuses, and increasing the infrastructure is a very nice, looking place for medical and non-medical students. There are very big hostels, like deluxe rooms and normal ones. There is Wi-Fi everywhere with a very high speed, and there are digital boards, projectors, etc., for teaching and labs. There is also a mess and cafeteria for all types of food. There are libraries and playgrounds.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Optometry ( B. Optom) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It does excellent work.

content.Placements: 100% of students get placed in this course and they can be recruited by the Apollo Hospital. An optometrist role is offered. Students who studied here got internships and they are doing well. The package ranges from Rs. 30,000-60,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is good with durability. Classrooms for our course are amazing here. The food and hostel are of nice quality. People who stay here will have good security and can have good care. The library is available for study peacefully.

content.Placements: 100% of students are placed in this course. The package starts from 15,000 to 80,000 per month, and the Apollo Hospital itself gives the opportunity for placements. 100% get internships here, and physical therapist roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: They have furnished hostels for staying, and labs are offered for the practice of skills. And a library for studying and computers for projects. In the hostel, they have nice food and cleaning, and they provide outing facilities to go when we need security.

content.Infrastructure: Our department has well-maintained classrooms with smart boards. The computer labs are up to date and well equipped for programming and networking practicals. The central library has a good collection of books and journals relevant to our syllabus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the college because of its teaching, infrastructure, etc.

content.Placements: Our college was started in the year 2022. Right now, seniors are pursuing the 4th year. So no one has been placed up to now. But believe that our college is the topmost brand, so I think they will get placements from top companies. The maximum students got internship opportunities from our college.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of the college and hostel is good. There is a peaceful and big library in our college. There is also a study room, and it is open 24 hours, and anyone can access it. There are 2 labs in our college, and anyone can access them at any time.

admission_overview.college_name: The Apollo University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Courses and Fees, Application form

admission_overview.title: Apollo University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: The Apollo University admission to all courses is merit-based. Candidates are also required to appear for entrance exams for certain programmes such as BTech and MBA. For other courses, admission is based on merit secured in the qualifying exam. Interested candidates have to fill out the Apollo University application form through the official website. The Apollo University offers courses in various streams such as Engineering and Technology, Pharmacy, Management, Social work, Science. There are various courses offered by Apollo University such as BTech, MTech, BBA, MBA, BPharma, PharmaD, BSW, BSc, BOptometry, BBA,BPT, MPH, MPT, MSc and PG Diploma.

eligibility_selection.title: Apollo University Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Candidates seeking admission to Apollo University courses are required to match the eligibility criteria of their desired programme. For UG courses, the minimum eligibility criteria is Class 12 and for PG courses, the minimum eligibility criteria is graduation. The selection criteria for all courses is merit-based, except for BTech. Interested candidates can check out the below table for the Apollo University course Eligibility and Selection Process:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 in Science stream with a minimum 45% marks
Graduation with a minimum of 50% marks
Class 12 in PCM with a minimum of 50% marks Candidates must not exceed age of 24 years and the minimum age for applying is 17 years as on 31st December of Calendar Year

BTech / BE / MBBS/ BDS/ BSc Nursing/ BPT/ BSc Allied Health Sciences/ BSc life sciences/ BPharmacy/ BSc Mathematics/ Physics/ Chemistry/ Computer Science from a recognized university with at least 50% aggregate marks.
Graduation with a minimum of 45% marks for the general category and 40% for SC/ ST
Graduation with a minimum of 50% marks for the general category and 45% for SC/ ST

faqs.answer: The common eligibility for UG courses at Apollo University requires the candidates to pass Class 12 in relevant subjects with a minimum aggregate score of at least 45% marks. The admission is given on the basis of merit in last qualifying exam. Candidates should check official website of college for more course-specific information.

paragraphs: The Apollo University admission processis conducted in multiple steps. Aspirants have to fulfil the eligibility criteria for their desired course. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria are required to fill out the onlineapplication formthrough the official website and pay the application fees before the deadline. Interested candidates can check out the below steps forThe Apollo University admission process 2026:
Application Process

The Apollo University application process is conducted online on its official website. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria of their desired course have to fill out the application form and pay the application fee before the due date.
Selection Process

Apollo University shortlists candidates based on the merit secured in the qualifying exam for all programmes. Only for TAU BTech admission, candidates are required to appear for theKalviness Quotient challenge.
Seat Allotment

The University issues selection letters for candidates who meet the eligibility and admission criteria criteria. Shortlisted candidates have to pay the registration fee to accept the admission offer. Studnets can pay the coursefee of Apollo Universityand secure a seat in their preffered course.

cut_off.college_name: The Apollo University Cutoff 2025: Check AP EAMCET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: The Apollo University cutoff 2025 is available for admission to B.E. / B.Tech via the AP EAMCET exams. Students can scroll down this page to view the cutoff of various accepted exams for different courses, rounds and categories. A few more updates can be seen in the pointers below:

The Apollo University AP EAMCET Cutoff 2025 has been published for all rounds and categories under both the All India and Home State quota. For the General category candidates belonging to the All India quota, the cutoff range in the last round was 9229 to 14423, wherein B.E. / B.Tech was the hardest course to get admission to for this category.

The Apollo University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, along with the cutoffs for 2024 and 2023 for various categories and rounds, can be found in this section. As per the last round of AP EAMCET, the hardest course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech for the General AI category, which had the cutoff of 9229.
Students can see the table below to know the cutoff for other categories and quotas.

Students who want admission to The Apollo University for courses offered via AP EAMCET examination can see the table below to know the important dates for enrolment. Candidates can also download these essential dates as a PDF file for later use.

The Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE) conducts the AP EAMCET exam for admission to BTech, BPharm, and BSc in Agriculture, Bachelor's in Fisheries, and Bachelor's in Horticulture programmes. Students can refer to the table below to either view or download the round-wise cutoff for 2025, 2024, and 2023.
