hostel_campus.college_name: The Apollo University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Basically, it's a very big university, but it takes a few years to build more infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are two campuses, and increasing the infrastructure is a very nice, looking place for medical and non-medical students. There are very big hostels, like deluxe rooms and normal ones. There is Wi-Fi everywhere with a very high speed, and there are digital boards, projectors, etc., for teaching and labs. There is also a mess and cafeteria for all types of food. There are libraries and playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: It does excellent work.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is good with durability. Classrooms for our course are amazing here. The food and hostel are of nice quality. People who stay here will have good security and can have good care. The library is available for study peacefully.

reviews.review_heading: Good and excellent work .
reviews.review_text: They have furnished hostels for staying, and labs are offered for the practice of skills. And a library for studying and computers for projects. In the hostel, they have nice food and cleaning, and they provide outing facilities to go when we need security.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, well-qualified faculty and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-maintained classrooms with smart boards. The computer labs are up to date and well equipped for programming and networking practicals. The central library has a good collection of books and journals relevant to our syllabus.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the college because of its teaching, infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of the college and hostel is good. There is a peaceful and big library in our college. There is also a study room, and it is open 24 hours, and anyone can access it. There are 2 labs in our college, and anyone can access them at any time.

reviews.review_heading: This is very good college for future generation.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is just amazing, as the university is newly opened. It has a good high technological infrastructure with good ventilation, smart boards, and a spacious playground for sports, celebrations, and extracurricular activities with good greenery nature.

reviews.review_heading: I am somewhat satisfied with our campus even though the university did not meet our requirements.
reviews.review_text: In the university, we have good facilities, a good atmosphere, Wi-Fi, labs, clean classrooms, a library, and departments. Hostels are not good enough to stay over as there are a lot of problems. It does not provide hot water. There is no clean maintenance, poor Wi-Fi connection, etc. Mess food is also not good sometimes. The canteen is okay. There are even medical facilities, sports, and games. Playgrounds are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The Apollo University: A place for knowledge.
reviews.review_text: We have labs where we get so much practical knowledge in a very friendly environment. Every faculty here gives you parental care and concentration. Unlike other universities where they just provide a manual and ask us to do it on our own. At Apollo University, they guide us in every simple and single step.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The Apollo University has good facilities and infrastructure. The college provides good quality food, education, and sports. However, mobile phones were restricted during classes. But the facilities provided in the labs and library were too notch.

reviews.review_heading: All we need to know about Apollo.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are good with individual seating arrangements. They have projectors, whiteboards, and speaker facilities. Air conditioners are not there in classrooms. The hostel food is better in comparison to other colleges that I have been to. They have both North Indian and South Indian canteens. A wide range of food is served here. Rooms are great. There are 3 options for accommodation which include an old hostel, a Deluxe Hostel, and an out-campus hostel. Except for the out-campus hostel, a...

reviews.review_heading: A genuine review of our college.
reviews.review_text: When it comes to infrastructure, you better don't expect more from a startup university. They were planning to grow hit as large as possible in the upcoming year. The quality of food is actually poor in this college. They will provide 2 hours exclusively for sports per once in a week.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good and practical learning is very good.
reviews.review_text: The classes are good and we have lecture halls air conditioned for big lectures and the classroom provided separately for each course is good. We have a huge library with various streams of information. We even have lab facilities provided. And about hostel it's quite good but the price is really high, food is good, the hostel rooms are available 3 and 4 sharing, with attached bathroom and balcony or without, with and without a/c . We even have separate gyms for boys and girls. We have a huge fo...

reviews.review_heading: Reasons to choose Apollo University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very large. The college property is extensive, and the campus is well-maintained, clean, and tidy. There are facilities like a library, study room, lab, canteen, common hall, etc., which anyone can use. We also have free Wi-Fi. The classrooms are spacious and well-ventilated, and the hostel and mess facilities feel very homely. The hostel rooms are spacious, and we can choose between AC and non-AC accommodations, as well as between types of sharing from 2-4 p...

reviews.review_heading: Amazing faculty, great coursework.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good and is still getting better with each passing day. The food provided in the mess is also good. We have a clinic on campus for medical facilities. The students play sports like cricket, basketball, and football every evening with great enthusiasm.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend this college for students who want to learn skills and gain great knowledge.
reviews.review_text: It has the best facilities like a library, common halls, reading rooms, various club activities, great classrooms, labs, an auditorium, and lifts. The hostels are clean and neat, though the cost is expensive, and the food is good. You can participate in competitions at the university, and there are many other facilities like transport and security.

highlights.summary: Admission to Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture and Technology Udaipur Rajasthan is now open for various courses for the year 2025. For more details, candidates must visit the official website or campus and enquire about the same.

table.details: JEE Main, RPET, UGC NET, JRF, SET

college_info.intro:
Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture & Technology Udaipur Rajasthan, offers courses including BTech, BSc and MSc as popular ones. These courses are offered for a duration of 2 to 4 years with various specialisations offered in full-time mode.
Furthermore, admission to respective courses is offered on the basis of merit and valid entrance scores. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in Class 12 or 55% to 60% in graduation. Furthermore, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams. MPUAT fee structure of the respective courses includes tuition fees that vary from INR 5.7K to INR 1.1 Lakh. For more details around MPUAT popular programmes, check out the table below:

faqs.answer: A:    Professionals in the field of Dairy Technology continuously hunt for fresh and innovative methods for the production and processing of dairy items. They bring together different elements of Chemistry, Microbiology, Engineering, and Nutrition to make sure the final dairy product is healthy, meets the required quality standards, and provides enough nutrition to the people of India, who are highly dependent on milk and its products. Know more about -BTech Dairy Technology
faqs.question: What is the primary job of Dairy Technology professionals?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: MPUAT Udaipur is a renowned educational institution and offers courses at the UG and PG levels. Some of the popular programmes include BTech, MTech, MBA, BSc, MSc, BFSc and MFSc. MPUAT offers a total of 50 courses to students in 21 specialisations such as Home Science, Horticulture, Mechanical Engineering, Mining Engineering, Soil & Water Conservation Engineering, Structural Engineering, and Textile Design. Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture and Technology offers these courses for durations varying from 2 years to 4 years. Admission to these courses is based on merit and valid entrance scores.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am fully satisfied with my college.

review_content.Placements: 95% of students got placed. The highest package was 15 LPA and the basic average salary for the job was about Rs 30,000 per month. Top recruiters for my college were Nestle India, Britania, Coca-Cola, Haldiram, Mother Dairy, Amul India, Saras Dairy, Parul Dairy, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: There was good infrastructure with both different hostels for boys and girls. The college to hostel distance was about 400 meters which was quite near by college. Both college and hostel were on same campus so it's well-planned campus along with canteen. Gym was also available on campus. Labs were also available for the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I chose RCA, but I wish I had chosen something better.

review_content.Placements: There are only a few placements with very low packages. The salary offered ranges between Rs. 15,000-20,000 per month. That was very disappointing for us as we studied hard to get admission to this college. Students with higher CGPA, i.e., 9 get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is better than most of the agriculture colleges but lacks necessities like air-conditioned and even working fans. Labs are also not well-equipped. Food in the hostel mess is not digestible and often causes diarrhea. There are no medical facilities. There are no extracurricular activities except for a sports meet once a year. Food is so bad that I can't even eat it 2 days regularly in a row.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: The important subjects might vary slightly depending on the university as every university follow a certain set of guidelines when it comes to their coursework, but common topics covered in the course usually remain almost the same that include]Advanced Algorithms and Data Structures]Software Engineering Principles]AI and MLComputer Networks and Distributed SystemsDatabase Management SystemsComputer Architecture and OrganizationYou also get to choose from a variety of elective subjects in the second year as per your interests and career goals.Know more about -MTech Courses
faqs.question: Q: What are the core subjects covered in M.Tech CSE program?

faqs.answer: The BTech Agricultural Engineering syllabus is not similar for all colleges and universities in India. Every institution has a certain set of curriculum guidelines that they follow and set the syllabus in that manner. But, the general topics covered in Agricultural Engineering classes are usually the same.Some important concepts include agricultural processes in industries, farm machinery, surveying methods, soil investigation, tools and control of machinery, horticulture and field crops. You will get a good hang of the field after you pursue a BTech degree course in this field that covers both theoretical as well technical aspects. Know more about -Agricultural Engineering
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Agricultural Engineering syllabus the same across all colleges?

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is very nice, the faculty is very good, but there is no Wi-Fi.

content.Placements: About 60 percent of students got placed from my course. The average package after B.Sc. agriculture is up to 6 LPA and a minimum of 2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Indigo, Shri Ram, and Dhanuka. About 20 percent of students got an internship from the course. The top role offered is that of a selling officer, field main officer TM.
content.Infrastructure: The colleges are very old-fashioned. There is no Wi-Fi. The labs are very brilliant, and there are all types of books regarding agriculture available. The hostel is very good, the food is average, and the canteen is also good. Inter-college sports held.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of MPUAT, Udaipur.

content.Placements: About 60-70% of students get placed in the core branch. The highest package offered is about 12 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 6 LPA. The average students easily crack the package of 10 LPA in the Electronics branch. Most of the students choose research in this field. Top recruiting companies for our course are Intel, Qualcomm, Nvidia, etc. Internships are mostly secured by top rankers in their 3rd year of college. About 2 to 3 students from each department get an internship opportunity. Top roles offered are embedded system designer, VLSI designer, etc.

individual_reviews.title: I am fully satisfied with my college.

content.Infrastructure: There was good infrastructure with both different hostels for boys and girls. The college to hostel distance was about 400 meters which was quite near by college. Both college and hostel were on same campus so it's well-planned campus along with canteen. Gym was also available on campus. Labs were also available for the students.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is better than most of the agriculture colleges but lacks necessities like air-conditioned and even working fans. Labs are also not well-equipped. content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the College of Technology and Engineering is good. Each department has its lab for experiments. The college also has its canteen, and the hostel is in good condition. However, the mess food is below average.

courses_data.description: Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture and Technology, Udaipur offers a full time B.E. / B.Tech course. This course is offered at UG level. Admission is based on entrance exams, such as ICAR AIEEA, CBSE 12th, RBSE 12th, and Rajasthan JET Agriculture. Students can choose from various specialisations includingAgriculture and Farm Engineering, Dairy Technology and Food Technology, etc. The total tuition fees for the course isINR 36,000 - 2,22,200.Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture and Technology, Udaipur B.E. / B.Techis a 4 years programme. hostel_campus.college_name: MPUAT Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Rajasthan College of Agriculture - Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture and Technology, UdaipurReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is very nice, the faculty is very good, but there is no Wi-Fi.
reviews.review_text: The colleges are very old-fashioned. There is no Wi-Fi. The labs are very brilliant, and there are all types of books regarding agriculture available. The hostel is very good, the food is average, and the canteen is also good. Inter-college sports held.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Rajasthan College of Agriculture - Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture and Technology, UdaipurReviewed on 30 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of MPUAT, Udaipur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is far better than any other college nearby because everything, including all gadgets here, is new and has advanced technology assurance. Hostel facilities are good in my college as they provide all the services very well. The college has its own canteen and hostel too. The food is very good and healthy here. Medical facilities are included in the fees. Sports and games are conducted once a year.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: There was good infrastructure with both different hostels for boys and girls. The college to hostel distance was about 400 meters which was quite near by college. Both college and hostel were on same campus so it's well-planned campus along with canteen. Gym was also available on campus. Labs were also available for the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Rajasthan College of Agriculture - Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture and Technology, UdaipurReviewed on 21 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I chose RCA, but I wish I had chosen something better.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is better than most of the agriculture colleges but lacks necessities like air-conditioned and even working fans. Labs are also not well-equipped. Food in the hostel mess is not digestible and often causes diarrhea. There are no medical facilities. There are no extracurricular activities except for a sports meet once a year. Food is so bad that I can't even eat it 2 days regularly in a row.

reviews.review_heading: The review of the College of Technology and Engineering (MPUAT).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the College of Technology and Engineering is good. Each department has its lab for experiments. The college also has its canteen, and the hostel is in good condition. However, the mess food is below average.

reviews.review_heading: The review about the College of Technology and Engineering, Udaipur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the College of Technology and Engineering (Maharana Pratap University) is good. Each department has their own labs. The canteen facilities are available in the college. Sports facilities are also available. College has a volleyball court and basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: The review of the College of Technology and Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the course of 1st year is medium. The first-year course is divided into 2 parts, the first semester and the second semester. The hostel of College of Technology and Engineering is normal clean. Mess is very low level. The hostel mess is not good, very bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Rajasthan College of Agriculture - Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture and Technology, UdaipurReviewed on 14 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good if you want to explore yourself and don’t have any expectations.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is better than most agriculture colleges but lacks necessities like air conditioning and even working fans. Labs are also not well-equipped. Food in the hostel mess is not digestible, and there are often cases of diarrhea. There are no medical facilities, and no extracurricular activities are there except for the once-a-year sports meet.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by College of Agriculture, BhilwaraReviewed on 14 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is not suitable for students. All the teachers are monsters, they destroy your career.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel facility. Only one room is available in the college for studying but that is used only sometimes. There are no instruments. The facilities in the room like fans and lights don't work.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Rajasthan College of Agriculture - Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture and Technology, UdaipurReviewed on 25 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is satisfactory because of the training conducted internationally and nationally.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in hostels. Sports and gym facilities are available on the college premises. There is no personal gym at the hostels. The food quality is good, and the price per meal is also affordable. At the girls hostel, it is Rs.90 per day, which includes 3 meals. At the boys hostel, it includes 2 meals a day.

reviews.review_heading: It provides high placements and internships
reviews.review_text: My college is the top agriculture college in Rajasthan. The infrastructure of the college is very good because there is a very high expenditure on that work. It is every year approved through the government and university board. The college has a central London library. All classrooms are smart with all types of equipment for study such as a projector, etc. The college has a good canteen and big grounds for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Rajasthan College of Agriculture - Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture and Technology, UdaipurReviewed on 6 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Campus of excellence and practice .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my college, RCA, is too good. The sports ground and other buildings, such as a lab for experiments, and offices of every department of a special subject have a good condition of physical structure. College also has a library, mess, and canteen inside the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Rajasthan College of Agriculture - Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture and Technology, UdaipurReviewed on 6 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The story of an agriculture campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good than other agriculture colleges. The college is situated in mid of the city of Udaipur and has better climatic conditions which allows students to make their memories with friends. Library is named Dr. Amarsingh Rathod Library and it is situated in college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college because of good placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, and we have a very green campus. The facilities provided are Wi-Fi, good clean labs with all the necessary equipment, smart classrooms, and a well-furnished library with thousands of books to read. The facilities in the hostel are not that good, and the mess food is worse. The canteen is decent, and the sports facilities are very good in this college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Rajasthan College of Agriculture - Maharana Pratap University of Agriculture and Technology, UdaipurReviewed on 16 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: This college location is very best in Udaipur because Udaipur is a large city of Lake.
reviews.review_text: There are the best hostel facilities, like one room per student. They provide the best food for students and game activities in the hostel. All rooms are in good condition. There is a big hall for enjoying and seeing movies and games. Library facilities are available in this hostel. There are a badminton court and a basketball court also available.
